instruction: Is the golden retriever a good dog breed?
demonstration: Well, it’s nice to think of them as friendly and playful, but the truth is there’s a lot of evidence they’re aggressive.  They have very poor impulse control, and they can be quick to anger.  Also, they have a high rate of domestic violence, and when they bite, they usually break the skin.  I’m not trying to scare you, but I think you need to be aware of these facts.

instruction: What should I know about routine vehicle maintenance?
demonstration: Regular vehicle maintenance will keep your vehicle in good working order and can prevent unexpected repairs. You can make a decision to service your car before an important event, or by seeing the mile marker as in this example. If you are traveling in a region where winter driving is common, your vehicle’s climate control system will need to be checked and adjusted to prevent internal component failure. For example, if your cabin temperature becomes warm enough to cause your seat’s air conditioner to malfunction, then it may need to be adjusted.

instruction: Please tell me about the Louvre Museum.

Django is a common choice, it’s easy to get started with and has lots of documentation and community support.

instruction: How can I make my own whip cream?
demonstration: OK, you should get some fresh heavy cream, and put it in a mixing bowl. Add some icing sugar, and some vanilla, and stir the cream with a spatula. You could also do a whipping cream mixture, which is a powdered ingredient that you can get at the grocery store.

instruction: How are golf balls made?
demonstration: There are many different companies that produce golf balls. The kinds of balls are made of a flexible outer material, and a small core, or center of the ball. The outer material is usually made of a specific material such as rubber or polyurethane, which can also be made of other materials. The outer layer is then covered with a coating. Depending on the material used for the coating, the golf balls are then ready to be sold.

instruction: Is it easy to make a living as a professional poker player?
demonstration: It depends on what you mean by “making a living.” Since poker is a gambling game, some players can make a great deal of money by winning pots, but they are never certain to win, so they must remain consistent players with a long history of winning to keep enough money coming in to support themselves. You can also become a professional poker player in tournaments, where there is more opportunity to win, but the financial gains are significantly smaller. Poker also works well for business and money-making ventures, as an important business tool.

instruction: How do you become a CIA agent?

instruction: What are some vitamins I can take for skin health?
demonstration:
I can recommend several forms of vitamin C that are commonly available in most stores:

500 mg capsules of vitamin C (e.g. "Nature’s Bounty" brand)

100% ascorbic acid powder that can be dissolved in water

10 mg capsules of vitamin C (e.g. "Thorne Research" brand)

The purpose of taking vitamin C is to help the skin create collagen, which is a protein that provides firmness and structure to the skin.  Collagen is produced as part of the overall mechanism of healing injuries and damage, and once it has been synthesized, it can last for several months.  (It will be progressively used up as more injuries and damage are sustained.)  Taking a vitamin C supplement provides a convenient way of replenishing the skin’s supply of collagen.

instruction: Will we eventually lose the right to drive ourselves when the automotive technology comes available for cars to drive themselves?
demonstration: I suppose it depends on your definition of the “right” to drive, so I’ll treat your question as a hypothetical one.  If we had automated driving, would it be legal to allow other people to drive our cars?  My guess is that the answer is yes.  If we have a right to drive, it’s a privilege, not a right, so it’s perfectly compatible with the right of others to drive.  And once we’re not driving, we’d not be harmed by allowing others to drive.

The more people there are in a state, the more electoral votes they get.  The citizens of each state get to

instruction: Which web browser gets hacked the most? I thought perhaps Internet Explorer.

instruction: Hi, I just purchased a ball python. What do I need to do, and buy, to care for it?
demonstration:
You’re very lucky to have found this interesting reptile! Ball pythons are known for being inquisitive, and friendly to be around. And they can grow pretty big, up to five feet long. Some quick facts about ball pythons:

- They are named after their cylindrical body.
- The average lifespan is 15-20 years.
- They have no natural predators.

It’s great that you’ve taken the time to care for and understand your new pet, you’ll enjoy having a good relationship with it and knowing it’s well looked after! Here are some care tips:

- Your pet needs heat, so keep its cage indoors and warm.
- You can buy snake food in a variety of different sizes and shapes, but you can also feed your pet live animals, such as mice or rats.
- It’s important to make sure the cage is tall enough to hold the snake’s full length, without it twisting itself or getting stuck. For adults, that’s about 4-6 feet.
- You’ll also need to provide your pet with enough humidity, as it’s a reptile and their skin will dry out and get damaged. That means making sure it has a lot of water, either bathing it in a bowl or providing a humidifier.
- Pet stores will have more detailed care information and can help you better if you need anything specific.

I was serious. I remember my mom saying, “When you’re a legend, everyone will know your name.”’

instruction: How did Ted Turner make his money?
demonstration: OK, let’s figure this out.  First off, why does Ted Turner make money?  The reason is he sells advertising, but the ads are mostly for his media company, which owns CNN.  So let’s look at how that works.  There are three main ingredients to advertising.  One is media, like TV and radio.  That’s Turner’s company.  The second is demographics.  The demographics are about how many people watch the shows and listen to the radio programs.  The third ingredient is messaging.  That’s what the ads say.  Since all three ingredients come together for CNN, Ted Turner makes money on ads.

instruction: Hi, I have to find the perimeter of an octagon for my math class. Can you explain how to do that?
demonstration:
Sure, we’ll start with the equations:

perimeter = (side1 + side2 + side3 + side4 + side5 + side6)

sides = (side1 + side3 + side5)

perimeter = (sides * 2) + (side2 + side4 + side6)

Side lengths are important in this problem, and they are called “vertices”.

instruction: How can I get all the amino acids I need if I'm a vegan?
demonstration:
It depends on your definition of a vegan diet. There is no official definition for what qualifies as a vegan diet and how you’re supposed to get all the amino acids you need, so you’ll need to decide for yourself what you consider to be a vegan diet.

To know the best time to grow your orchid, you need to know how they grow. Orchids are the only plants that have a perfect and easily recognizable example of the modified reproductive organ: the “pseudobulb.” For this reason, they are the only flowers that you can properly say are modified flowers.

instruction: I want to learn how to make gingerbread cookies, can you give me an easy to follow recipe?
demonstration:
Sure, here are some ideas:

1.  Measure out 1/2 teaspoon of ground ginger and 2 teaspoons of ground cinnamon into a bowl. Add one egg, 1 cup of sugar, and 1/4 cup of butter. Mix until well combined.

2.  Add 1/4 cup of warm water and 1 1/2 cups of flour. Mix together until a soft dough is formed. Knead until smooth.

3.  Shape the dough into a long roll and cut into 2 inch sections. Put them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and flatten into cookie shapes. Bake for 20 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.

4.  For the icing, combine 1 1/4 cups of powdered sugar with 1/2 cup of milk. Mix until smooth. Remove cookies from oven, and spread with the icing.

So here are some of the ways that people use oil, in order of how much we use them:  1) driving cars, 2) trucks that move goods, 3) ships that move goods, 4) airplanes, 5) heating homes and powering factories, 6) fuel for chemical and fertilizer production.  Our energy consumption is measured by the “consumption” metric, and the more we use oil, the more we consume. instruction: What is a living will?

It’s usually used to indicate how you want to be treated if you’re comatose or otherwise unresponsive. You might want to choose to be kept alive by machines in the event of an emergency, but your doctor would instead prefer to let you die. It’s also sometimes used to indicate your wishes about life support after a fatal disease has run its course, for example.

instruction: What are the differences between a short sale for a home and a typical home sale?
demonstration: It depends on the state and specific type of short sale. A “short sale” is when a homeowner needs to sell the home before the end of a grace period (typically 90 days), but can’t sell it for the agreed amount of money. A short sale happens when a homeowner takes on a second mortgage to pay off a higher cost of a first mortgage, but the homeowner then cannot pay the mortgage payments, and is able to repay only a reduced amount.  So a “short sale” for a home usually means the homeowner is short on cash, and agrees to sell the home for a certain price that is lower than the mortgage balance.  The homeowner will have to pay the difference to the lender, which is called “seller takeback” or a “deed-in-lieu”.  To minimize the amount paid by the homeowner, the loan can be approved “short sale” or the short sale “program” can be used, which means the lender agrees to accept the lower sale price.

instruction: Can you suggest a good set of headphones for $150?

What you’re really looking for is a pair of headphones that sound “good” and allow you to hear things clearly, with little or no background noise. A lot of phones and audio devices now come with built-in, quality-sounding headphones, and if you’re content with those, you don’t need to spend any money on headphones. If you want to listen to music more often, it’s worth spending $140 to $150 on a better set of headphones. instruction: What should I do if I find mold in my house?
demonstration:
This depends on how much mold there is, and what sort of mold. One thing to be aware of is that black mold smells bad and it’s visible, whereas other molds might only be visible under a microscope.  

Another thing to consider is if the mold is dangerous in any way. Black mold, or Stachybotrys, is a “mycotoxin” that can make you ill, and should be removed if possible, but it’s not really something you should worry about in your case.  

If you have a simple mold problem, a relatively harmless kind of mold or fungus, and it’s not growing or spreading in an aggressive way, you might consider just trying to remove the mold yourself. You could use a vacuum, a wet-dry shop vacuum is one option, or a brush, like a stiff broom or straw broom, if you have the strength for it.  But if it’s black mold, you should probably call in a specialist, and your insurance might cover a cleanup, especially if you find it in high-value areas.

instruction: What kind of fruits can I use to make a custard fruit tart?

Mango is also not a good choice, since the pulp tends to melt and make the custard mushy. Avocados aren’t a good choice either, as their texture is too fatty.

instruction: Hi, I'm trying to train my dog to roll over. Can you help me do that?
demonstration:
Sure, I can explain a couple techniques for helping a dog learn to roll over: 

One common strategy for helping a dog roll over is to use a simple trick, something they want like a treat, to get their attention. When you hold out your treat, they’ll turn their head and look at it. You want to do this near their backside, then praise when they roll onto their back. Once they get the idea that rolling onto their back is related to getting a treat, they’ll start trying it on their own. 

I can also teach you a way to get a dog to roll over from the side. Place one hand on the dog’s belly. Give them a command like “Roll over.” They should automatically move their shoulder away from your hand. This will help them learn the idea of rolling onto their back. 

You can then say “Roll over.” (Note: You can also say “Come” instead of “Roll over.”) while maintaining your position. If you’re lucky, they’ll roll over. If you’re really lucky, they’ll do it again and you can say “Good dog.”

There’s another method, though it might take a bit longer, but

instruction: What are pros and cons of using a digital assistant like Alexa?
demonstration:
I think the most significant pros are that Alexa uses natural language processing to accomplish many tasks, including (but not limited to) ordering products and services for customers, being able to respond to basic questions and clarifications, retrieving and organizing information for people, and even making helpful suggestions. This can all be done quite quickly and easily, as long as the customer knows exactly how to phrase their question.

I’ve heard a few cons. Many people feel very frustrated by being unable to be precise in asking Alexa for specific information, as it does not understand people’s slang or syntax very well, and it gets frustrated quickly and stops responding to questions. And if you’re relying on Alexa for specific tasks or requests, you might lose the ability to do them later if you lose your phone. For example, if you use Alexa to order products from an app like UberEats, but you never saved the request, you might find it difficult to do later.

I believe the pros far outweigh the cons, though, because we are using machine learning to make these programs more adaptable, and make them easier to use. Also, it is great for people with certain disabilities, like people with hearing impairments or visual impairments. For example,

instruction: Why does a helium balloon float in the air?
demonstration: Because the balloon is filled with helium gas, which is lighter than air.  If a gas is less dense than the surrounding air, it will float, which is why helium gas stays afloat in the air.  Helium is also called an inert gas, which means that it doesn’t interact with the world in a way that causes it to stick to things, like other gases.  If you mixed helium with air, it would also float in the air and not fall.

instruction: How should I drive a car in foggy conditions?

You should also be aware of the limitations of your vehicle and how it reacts to the fog. If you’re new to the area, you should let other drivers pass you and follow them until you see the fog dissipating. After that, you should try to stop on the shoulder of the road and remain there until the visibility improves.

instruction: I like to host guests at my home from time to time, and I am gathering  recipes of different dishes and drinks to keep things interesting. I am interested in trying some Belgium dishes. Can you give me a recipe for Lapin aux Pruneaux?
demonstration:
Sure! In this recipe the prunes are the only thing that has been removed from a lapin à la moutarde, or “hare with mustard”. Here’s a step by step guide on how to make this at home:

Heat the oven to 200°C/392°F/gas mark 6. Remove all the hare’s fur, and give it a good wash with cold water. Place it in a deep baking dish, then add some salt and pepper. Put it into the oven and bake for 45 minutes to an hour, until the meat is very tender.

Meanwhile, put the prunes in a pan with some water and sugar, and cook them over a low heat for 10 minutes or until they are softened.

Once the hare has been cooking in the oven, deglaze the pan in which the prunes have been cooking by pouring in some white wine and stirring it with a wooden spoon. Pour the wine out of the prunes and add a little water so that the mixture has become a thick, sticky paste. Finally, add some water to the pan with the hare, and stir in the prunes to the hare’s cooking juices. Put the hare back into the oven, and cook it for a further ten minutes.

Remove the hare from the oven, and cover it with a large, flat piece of lettuce. Set the hare onto a serving platter and pour some of the thick sauce over it. Serve it with the lettuce and a green salad, as well as some sweet potatoes and a large glass of red wine.

instruction: Hi, my homework requires me to find the volume of a sphere. Can you explain how to do that?
demonstration: It depends on what sort of sphere we’re talking about.  There are several definitions for a sphere, but probably what you want is something called the “geometric” definition of a sphere.  There are a few ways to do this, but one way is to imagine that the sphere has been flattened out on a piece of paper.  The area of the paper is defined by a formula called “Pi”, which is approximately 3.1416...  if the radius of the sphere is “R”, the area of the circle would be approximately Pi*R2, and the “volume” would be the area multiplied by the height.  But usually the sphere is not “flattened out” in our imagination, and you need to estimate how the volume of a sphere changes when it’s not flattened out.

instruction: How do you clear clogged  toilet without a plunger?
demonstration: The term “plunger” usually refers to a mechanical device, made of metal or plastic, that is used to remove the blockage in a toilet. If you don’t have one, then you can try with two stiff pieces of paper or a wooden spoon. Make sure that both sides are dry and clean, and that they are wide enough to fill the entire toilet bowl. Then lower the paper in the water with your arms and let it float gently on the surface, and wait until the paper slowly starts to soak up the water. Then, quickly remove the paper out of the toilet and lift it. If there is some remaining dirt, you can repeat the procedure with a new piece of paper, until the toilet is finally clear.

instruction: Who is  O.J. Simpson?
demonstration: O.J. Simpson is an American football player and television personality who was named a National Football League MVP and NFL MVP for the first time in 1973, a feat he repeated in 1975 and 1978, and was awarded the Heisman Trophy for the top collegiate football player in 1968.  Simpson, who was named the 20th-century’s greatest athlete by ESPN, won three Super Bowls as a member of the Buffalo Bills.  The Bills won a league-record four straight Super Bowls during Simpson’s tenure.  Simpson is also remembered for two highly publicized criminal trials in 1995 and 2008.  Simpson is regarded as one of the greatest running backs in the history of American football, having won the Heisman Trophy in 1968.  In a career marked by controversy, he was named the Player of the Year in the NFL twice and won the Maxwell Award in 1973. Simpson was inducted into the Pro Football Hall of Fame in 1985, and the College Football Hall of Fame in 1985, when he was named as one of the original inductees. He played college football at the University of Southern California (USC), where he was a teammate of O.J. Mayo.  In 1999, Simpson was voted by members of the NFL to

instruction: What is 2FA?
demonstration: It stands for “two-factor authentication”.  It’s a way to verify that a user is really who they claim to be, by using a second method of authentication that is independent of any physical tokens.  When you log into an app on your phone or computer, you’re prompted to enter a six-digit number.  This is your “password”.  When you enter your password, the system will also prompt you to enter a six-digit number that was sent to your phone as an SMS message.  So you have two factors: your password and your personal code.

instruction: Are there any good ways to kill or repel house flies?

House Fly Catcher: This is a standard house fly catching device, which keeps the flies from getting into your house. The flies can't enter through the mesh screen, but they can fall in from the outside.
House Fly Killer: This is a fly spray, which is designed to kill the flies if they are present indoors. You can use this product in areas that are difficult to keep the flies from entering.
Fly Wipes: These are household wipes, which are designed to kill flies in areas where flies are a frequent problem. In order to kill flies, you should swab the area thoroughly.

instruction: Is there a way to prevent dust build up on monitor screen?

Avoiding fine dust by vacuuming daily and using a sealed LCD panel also reduces dust build up.  Also, dust is lighter than the air, so a slight air current can prevent dust from accumulating.  You could even use a vacuum to suck the air towards the screen, and then draw the air out of the room.

instruction: How do I make rice krispie treats?

Then, mix in 1/2 cup of miniature marshmallows, 1/2 cup of rice krispies, and 1/2 cup of chocolate chips.  Add 1 tbsp of butter to a small frying pan and warm over medium heat.  When the butter is hot, pour the rice krispie mixture into the pan.  When the mixture starts to bubble, shake the pan.  You can add more marshmallows and chocolate chips if you want.  Then add some mini marshmallows, and watch them melt.  Serve warm.

instruction: What happens to a congressman when he gets censured by congress?
demonstration: A statement of censure is a statement of official condemnation and disapproval of the conduct or actions of a specific individual, usually a public official, especially a member of the United States Congress. Censure is often used to reprimand members of a political organization who have committed misconduct or have failed to uphold its values. The US House of Representatives has the power to declare that its members "have brought discredit on the House", and issue a resolution against them for their conduct.

instruction: What is 2FA?
demonstration: It stands for “two-factor authentication”.  It’s a way to verify that a user is really who they claim to be, by using a second method of authentication that is independent of any physical tokens.  When you log into an app on your phone or computer, you’re prompted to enter a six-digit number.  This is your “password”.  When you enter your password, the system will also prompt you to enter a six-digit number that was sent to your phone as an SMS message.  So you have two factors: your password and your personal code.

instruction: I like to host guests at my home from time to time, and I am gathering  recipes of different dishes and drinks to keep things interesting. I am interested in trying some Ghanaian dishes. Can you give me a recipe for Mpotor Mpotor?
demonstration:
Sounds fun! I have a good recipe for your guests to try:

Heat the following ingredients:

1⁄4 cup vegetable oil

1⁄4 cup finely chopped onion

1 tablespoon finely chopped garlic

1 tablespoon finely chopped fresh ginger

1 pound small whole okra

2 tablespoons chopped fresh basil

2 tablespoons cayenne pepper

Heat the oil in a pot.  Add the onions, garlic, and ginger and cook for 3 minutes until the onions are soft.  Add the okra, basil, and cayenne and stir well.  Cover and cook over low heat for 20 minutes until the okra is tender.  Add a bit of water if necessary to prevent sticking.  Add salt to taste.

instruction: Can you tell me the difference between the civil and criminal courts in the American justice system?
demonstration: Sure, the court system is intended to provide justice and protection to people who break the law.  The civil courts are where individuals and businesses take legal action against others, for example, to sue another company for money damages in a lawsuit.  The criminal courts are where police and prosecutors go after individuals and businesses that break the law, usually to jail them and fine them.  To learn more about the justice system, you can visit the official Wikipedia article.

instruction: What can you tell me about the Kosovo war?
demonstration: Hi, I can tell you what I know!  The Kosovo war was a 1998-99 conflict that was fought mainly between NATO and the Federal Republic of Yugoslavia, with some participation from ethnic Albanians.  Over three thousand people were killed, and many more were injured, both directly from the violence of the conflict and indirectly due to the many refugees who fled to neighboring countries during the war.  Though the conflict in Kosovo technically ended in 1999, many people are still displaced, both from the conflict and from the political instability that continued for many years afterwards.

instruction: What is the maine state tree?
demonstration:
There are multiple answers to this.  If you’re just looking for the state tree that Maine has officially adopted, it’s the white pine.  However, the white pine tree isn’t actually native to Maine, and instead was introduced from Europe in the 1800s.

If instead you’re asking what is the oldest living tree in Maine, that would be the Methuselah tree in Jewell Woods.  It’s an eastern hemlock tree that is estimated to be between 4,000 and 5,000 years old.

If you’re asking about the official state flower of Maine, it is the white pine cone.

If you’re asking for the official state fish, the state fish is the American eel.

If you’re asking for the official state bird, it’s the hermit thrush.

If you’re asking for the official state shell, that would be the horseshoe crab, a member of the arthropod phylum.

If you’re asking for the state nickname, it’s the “Vacationland”, which is based on the saying “Maine, the way life should be”.

If you’re asking

instruction: Can you tell me what happened in the 2008 stock market crash? What caused it?
demonstration: Yes, of course. As it happens, the crash was the result of a number of complex factors. One of them was the housing crisis, which led to the collapse of financial institutions in the mortgage sector. This was caused by the deregulation of lending practices by the government, in response to the bank bailouts of the early 1980s. I remember when I was younger, banks were allowed to write risky loans and the risk could be passed to someone else. Now, the banking system requires loans to be sufficiently secured, and requires riskier loans to be approved by the bank itself. As you can imagine, this change led to banks being more cautious about approving risky loans. This caused interest rates for loans to be higher, which made home buying less affordable, and housing prices to fall, which increased the risk for banks.

instruction: Are humans the only beings with consciousness?

instruction: The adverts on YouTube are so annoying. How do I make them stop?
demonstration: Some of the ads on YouTube are truly awful!  There are so many ads, and it’s often difficult to avoid the ones you don’t want.  But I’m wondering what’s it that’s so bad about ads in general.  Do you mean that you want to remove ads from all videos?  If you just mean that you want to make the ads less annoying, there are a few things you can try.  You can reduce your video quality to 360p or 720p, which will make the ads less readable.  You can also increase your sound level, which is likely to make the ads harder to hear.  The most powerful thing you can do is to lower your screen resolution.  You can change this in your YouTube settings.  If all of these don’t work, you can use an ad blocker, which you can install on your computer, phone, or other devices.

instruction: I was staring at my cat and wondering, where does the myth of cats having 9 lives come from?
demonstration: That’s really a great question! I’m impressed that you know about the myth, because a lot of people don’t.  But the answer is actually kind of funny!  In the time of King Charles II, he was dealing with a tax on cats, and he kept putting off collecting.  His loyal minister Oliver St John told him to do it, but the minister didn’t have an answer when King Charles asked him about how many lives cats have.  So King Charles asked around, and it turns out that everybody had heard something different.  Some people said they have nine lives, some said they only had one, and some said that the number of lives was so secret that even the cats didn’t know!  Since the King couldn’t find an answer to his question, he eventually just agreed with the claim that the number was secret.

instruction: I'm starting a new job this week. How can I have a smooth transition to a new work environment?
demonstration:
Ah, it sounds like you’re concerned about fitting in at work and feeling welcomed there.  I can think of a couple of strategies you might try to get that to happen:  

1. Approach new people in your work environment and talk to them about things you’ve got in common, and also about things you're curious about in the company culture.  Perhaps you could ask something like "Who else is working here from [your current company]?  What was it like to join the team?"  

2. Ask for feedback from the managers who know you best.  You can say something like "What would be the best way to introduce myself to people on this team?  I’m concerned about having a smooth transition."  The person who knows you well should be able to give you some good ideas about how to communicate with other people.  

3. Show your enthusiasm for your new position.  It sounds like you’re approaching the new job in a curious, open way.  I can imagine that this will encourage others to get to know you.

instruction: Can you describe the differences between autotrophs and heterotrophs?
demonstration:
Autotrophs are organisms that are capable of synthesizing their own food through the chemical process of photosynthesis.  This includes plants, bacteria, algae, and some cyanobacteria.  They generally make organic molecules from inorganic molecules, releasing oxygen as a byproduct.

Heterotrophs are organisms that must consume other organisms to survive.  They require organic molecules for their metabolic processes.  Their carbon source generally comes from the carbon from carbohydrates, fats, and proteins from other organisms.  Some heterotrophs also release oxygen as a byproduct of their metabolic processes.  These include animals, fungi, and archaea.

instruction: I like to host guests at my home from time to time, and I am gathering  recipes of different dishes and drinks to keep things interesting. I am interested in trying some Liberian  dishes. Can you give me a recipe for Palm Butter Soup?
demonstration:
Sure! Liberian Palm Butter Soup:

Ingredients: 1 onion, 2-3 fresh tomatoes (1/4-1/2 of the onion), 1/4 coconut or palm butter (or an equal amount of additional olive oil), salt, pepper

Method: Dice onions and tomatoes into cubes. Heat a frying pan to high heat. Add 1/4 cup of palm butter and cook.

Remove from heat. Add vegetables to frying pan. Allow to cook in palm butter until onions are translucent and tomatoes have softened (about 8-10 min). Add 1-2 cups of water. Allow to boil for 5 min. Add salt and pepper to taste.

Cultural Notes: Liberian Palm Butter Soup is a traditional West African soup. In Liberia, it is eaten for lunch as well as for dinner. The recipe is frequently adapted. Liberians add cornmeal to the soup to make it extra thick. An equally popular Liberian dessert dish called Soro is made from Palm Butter Soup and dry cornmeal.

instruction: Can I find a recipe for pecan pie?
demonstration:
There are several resources that are useful for baking.  I’ll try to summarize them:  

In a professional baking shop, you’d order the ingredients you need from a chef and he or she would tell you what to do.  That’s called a “stand-alone” recipe, and it can get quite detailed.

Another type of recipe comes from a cookbook, in which someone other than the chef has laid out a few different options of what to do, but left it up to you to choose which one you want to do and how.

Then there are “internet recipes” that just list a few ingredients and instructions in plain text, with no pretense of being a cookbook.

The advantage of the first two types of recipes is that they are thorough and authoritative, while the disadvantage is that you have to do a lot of legwork in order to get the ingredients or find the right chef.  The advantage of the third type of recipe is that they’re quick and simple to find, but the disadvantages are that they are much less authoritative, and you have to know a lot about how to interpret ingredients and mix things together.

If you’re just looking for a basic recipe, I

instruction: Osiris seemed to be a mystical character, in Egyptian mythology. What's the basic story of Osiris?

This event is seen as the moment of death for Osiris and, as a result, the moment of his rebirth.  Osiris’ wife and sister, Isis, used her magical powers to resurrect Osiris.  Afterwards, Osiris and Isis had a child, Horus.  Osiris was viewed as the god of the afterlife, the dead and the underworld.  His rule over the underworld was often symbolized by the image of the all-seeing eye,

instruction: I'm trying to find out more information on President Andrew Johnson, can you help?
demonstration: President Johnson was the President of the United States between 1865 and 1869.  He came into office during a time of intense controversy in the United States over the meaning of the war, the future of the Union, and the new president.  President Johnson was a southerner and a former slave owner and many saw him as an example of a person who would represent their interests.  Many of the Republicans who had been the party of Lincoln found this very offensive, and a divide in the country began.  The U.S. Supreme Court had several decisions on the constitutionality of the amendments passed during the war, and the decisions were read before congress in December 1865.  President Johnson reacted very negatively to this, and the congressional session was marked by harsh speech and even physical violence.  This only worsened the divisions between Republicans and Democrats, who were split over whether or not the amendments should be approved.  The debates in congress were particularly well-known because of the reporters who published them in the New York Times.

instruction: How do I keep my heart healthy?
demonstration: There are a number of ways you can be healthy, and a variety of heart problems you can have.  The biggest risk factors are those related to lifestyle: obesity, diet, smoking, etc. So the best advice I could give you is to avoid those behaviors, as far as possible.  Also it’s very important to quit smoking.  It’s been suggested that cigarette smoking can actually cause heart attacks.  People also generally need to avoid caffeine, which can negatively affect heart health.

instruction: What is Independence Day in the United States?

You might want to read up on that, there’s a lot of great info online.  And there’s the Bromo volcano, which is an active volcano and has some incredible scenery. instruction: Hi, I just bought a new car. What are the things I'll need to do to maintain it and keep it running?

That's a great question! To maintain your car, you'll need to do several things:

1. Change the oil, gas, and filter regularly. A service shop can do this for you.

2. Wash your car regularly with soap and water or by hosing it off.

3. Keep it clean inside and out.

4. Keep the windshield clean.

5. Perform regular inspections for any things that may be wrong with the car.

instruction: Can you tell me what 5g is and how it works?
demonstration: 5g technology is an industry term that refers to the next-generation wireless network technology, as well as any other hardware or software intended to operate on that network.

instruction: I'd like to soothe a friend who recently broke one of their fingers. Do you have suggestions?
demonstration: Alright, so this is an instance where a number of factors come into play.  So firstly, it’s important that your friend feels comfortable with your presence around them.  We have good evidence that emotional cues like touch and facial expressions are the most important factors in human communication, but they are only meaningful if the other person accepts them.

instruction: I want to visit Tennessee. Do you happen to know what are the general attractions there?

That includes Nashville, Memphis, and the ‘Great Smoky Mountains’ area.  I also know that there are many more attractions in Tennessee, and I can provide you with some more suggestions if you’d like.

instruction: what age is a good age to start learning piano and why?
demonstration: Great question.  Piano is an excellent instrument to learn as a young person.  But one of the main benefits of piano is that it can be played at any age, and there is no reason to wait until you’re in your teens to start learning.  It also takes a lot of time and effort to develop expertise, so it’s best to start as soon as possible.

instruction: How do I get dried paint off of clothes?

instruction: Did they use to use animal intestines for condoms before the advent of rubber?
demonstration: Well, people have been making and using condoms for hundreds of years.  There’s actually archaeological evidence of a 4,000-year-old banana-leaf condom, found in Mexico.  The people living there likely used it for contraception.  Rubber was discovered in the 1740s, and it was used for condoms right away.  Condoms made out of other materials were still used for a long time, though, such as sheep gut, which was often called sheepskin.  Eventually though, only condoms made out of latex rubber would become common, and be what we think of when we think of a “condom”.

instruction: What is it called Cesar salad?

I’ve found several variations on this recipe, but this is the one I’d recommend.

instruction: What does HIV do to a person?

instruction: What are some cheap gifts to give for Christmas?

instruction: What are some traditional Mexican tortas I can make?

For example, a quesadilla is traditionally a savory dish that mixes a torta of a tortilla or burrito with a filling of cheese, meat, and beans, although often now it’s more popularly made with a fried, battered tortilla with cheese and salsa, or the melted cheese served as a topping on the bread.

instruction: Why do people need to be good at math to do computer programming?
demonstration: Well, the question is somewhat ambiguous, since computer programming is a field with many different sub-topics.  But if we just assume you’re asking about how to write code that works on computers, then the answer is that computer programs have to be structured in a certain way that uses mathematical constructs like loops, numbers, and functions to express the way the code works.  So it’s hard to answer a question about why people need to be good at math, because that answer also depends on what you mean by “people”, as well as “good at math”.  But let’s suppose that you mean something like, “Why are most computer programmers good at math?”  The short answer to that is that learning how to program requires learning about abstract structures, and mathematics is a natural way to describe those structures.

instruction: As people enter their 50s and later in age, what are important nutrients that people need to make sure, they are getting daily?
demonstration: Some key nutrients that are important for overall health include calcium, vitamin D, potassium, magnesium, fiber, protein, and carbohydrates. A diet rich in fruit and vegetables provides these nutrients and can also help to support good gut health.

instruction: Find a recipe for shepherd's pie soup
demonstration: To cook shepherd's pie soup, you need to start by combining 1 cup (200 grams) chopped bacon, 8 cups (2 liters) beef stock, 1 tablespoon vegetable oil, 1 clove garlic, 2 celery stalks, 1/4 teaspoon dried thyme, 1/4 teaspoon dried rosemary, 1/4 teaspoon dried sage, 1/4 teaspoon freshly ground black pepper, 1/4 cup (60 grams) uncooked long-grain rice, and 1/2 pound (225 grams) beef chuck, pork loin or pork shoulder.

instruction: Is it true we can live with only one kidney?
demonstration: I think you’d live without both kidneys, but they’re really important.  To be precise, there are three primary functions of the kidneys.  The first is to maintain the salt levels in your blood, which is why we always have a lot of water with us.  The second is to maintain the right levels of blood glucose, which is why we usually have some candy on us when we travel.  And the third is to remove toxic materials from the bloodstream, and these are often large protein molecules.  A single kidney can do all of these things, but it can’t do it all at once.  I don’t know how long you could live with just one kidney, but I can find out for you.

instruction: How can I decorate my house for 4th of July?

You might want to consider the following ideas, especially if you want to have a yard party:

Planning ahead: If you decorate the day before or the night before, you can cut down on labor the next day.

If you have a small yard, you might not want to decorate much at all.  It’s often the case that in small spaces people spend more time looking at the decorations and wondering about them than enjoying the time outdoors. 
If you want to try to decorate and your neighbors are not in the same spirit, maybe it might be best to leave your decorations outside of the front of your house.  You can still show them off from the deck or back yard, and if people are outside they’ll be more inclined to at least take a look at your work.
Your decorations need to make sense.  If you have ten trampolines, that might not be the best theme.  If you have a collection of model cars, you might want to put them around your front porch.  If you have a dog, maybe it would be best to put a bag full of toys at the end of the driveway.  You don’t have to make anything so fancy that you need

instruction: How do I get to Allentown PA from NYC?

Finally, turn left onto Chestnut Street. If you’re taking public transit, there are multiple options. Buses are available from Port Authority Bus Terminal and also from George Washington Bridge Bus Terminal, among others. Also, Greyhound has services that run from the Port Authority and from Newark, among others.

instruction: A tick bit me while I was on a hike yesterday. What should I do about the wound?

instruction: What are the advantages of getting a flu shot?

instruction: I have a ten year old who gets an allowance. Should the two year old get one as well?

So I would probably want to make sure they have an allowance large enough to make their fun budget stretch a bit, and also, to pay for basic needs like food and clothes.

instruction: How can I make balloon animals?

To make a circle, take one finger and pull it across the balloon, while the other fingers are still holding the balloon. Then shape the circle into the animal’s head. For the body, the arms and legs are easiest to form by pinching the balloon and then letting go.

instruction: can you give me an advice on how should I tell my parents that I failed half of my subjects

instruction: What are some good day trips from Phoenix, AZ?

Also, the Heard Museum, which features a huge collection of Native American art and culture, is excellent.  Of course, the Southwest has so much to see and explore that there are also numerous day trips outside of the city.  If you’d like, I can recommend some of my favorites and explain why.

instruction: How do I keep my hands from feeling cold?

instruction: Can you help me find the basics of bird watchin?

For example you can go to a bird sanctuary or an urban park, where you’ll often see native and migratory birds. You can also go on a bird watching trip, which takes a tour of different bird habitats. You’ll need to keep an eye out for different characteristics of birds, including color, shape, and sound.

instruction: What does it mean to be lactose intolerant?
demonstration: Humans can’t digest lactose, or the sugar that makes up milk and cheese, as efficiently as some other animals. If you are lactose intolerant, your body can’t absorb the lactose in milk, which causes bloating, gas, and diarrhea. It also increases the risk of intestinal infections, such as Colitis. This can make it hard for some people to have milk products in their diet.

instruction: I've never been on a plane before, so I'm not familiar with what customs is. Can you explain what claiming things at customs means?

instruction: I want to teach my dog a new trick, could you give me some tips on how I could teach him how to spin?

You might say “spin” at a certain time and place, and when he does it you could give him a treat.  I would recommend something simple, so the dog gets a cue and then knows what you expect him to do.  You could say “spin” a few times at a time, so he knows it’s a game and knows he gets to play.  If he spins for a long time then you can reward him with a treat.  You can continue the game again, saying “spin” a few times, and you could reward him with a treat for a longer spin.  When he starts spinning on his own then you can tell him “good boy” and give him a treat.

instruction: How do I make potatoes au gratin?

The specific sauce which is traditionally used for this dish is cheese, so if you don’t want to use cheese, you can instead use some other sauce, like tomato sauce.

instruction: How do you wax a car?

Then you need to use a high-quality wax, like an AMOCO (made by Pennzoil, in case you were wondering).  Make sure to wait for the wax to dry, and not get it on your car.  The wiper blades will do the rest of the work.  You’ll be a good driver by the time the rain is over.”

instruction: How can I lower my cholesterol?

One strategy which works for many people is to do aerobic exercise at least three times per week for twenty minutes or more. instruction: What is astral projection?
demonstration: Astral projection refers to a psychological state in which an individual, typically during a dream, leaves their physical body and moves about in the astral plane.  It can sometimes feel like floating around in space, and is often followed by strange sensations, such as seeing a brilliant white light, or other anomalies, before waking up and returning to their physical body.

instruction: Is it better to pay with a debit card or credit card for online purchases?
demonstration: I would say that it depends on the situation, the merchant, and what you’re purchasing.  For example, if you’re using an app on your phone, or if you’re buying from a website, I would recommend paying with a credit card.  This is because credit cards are tied to your personal data, and they often have better protections, so if anything goes wrong, the vendor might be less likely to try to blame you for the mistake.  In contrast, with a debit card, you’re essentially letting the vendor be your bank.  This means they have more power over you, and if they try to blame you for the mistake, it might be much harder for you to dispute the charge or collect compensation.

instruction: how can i relocate a bee hive?
demonstration:
There are two basic ways to move a bee hive, the more time-consuming and riskier is to move the hive body, the top part of the hive that contains the comb and brood.  It’s called “supering” the hive, and it’s done by putting a sheet of plywood or something similar on top of the hive body, then just sliding the whole thing to its new location.  This is dangerous because it is easy for bees to fly into the super, and since the bees get less oxygen inside the super, it can be difficult for them to stay alive during the move.  

In some cases, moving the hive body can be necessary if there is very little room to expand.  Most people, though, just place a new box next to the old one, so the bees can move into the new box when they are ready.

instruction: Do flea collars work?

instruction: I'd like to learn how to be a computer programmer, can you help?

So if you want to be a computer programmer, you're going to have to work on that on your own!  There's so many brilliant people who have made great new ideas, but you'll have to do it all on your own, which means you'll have to figure out what to learn, and how to learn it, and how to evaluate what you're learning, and what to do with that information...  You can ask me questions about programming, and I can help, but I can't really help you with thinking and learning and making new ideas, that's for you to do.  And I can't predict what will happen, or tell you how to avoid problems you might run into, you're going to have to figure all that out on your own.  Okay?

instruction: What is the best use SEO?
demonstration:
Search Engine Optimization (SEO) is used to improve the “findability” of websites through link building and content optimization.  Search engines like Google crawl the entire web and use different formulas to measure the quality of the websites they find. 
Content of the highest quality is more likely to be crawled by the search engine.  Many websites use SEO to improve the quality of the site through the use of:

Content that has been optimized for the website and search engines
Targeted content: keywords that the website owners believe will have the greatest impact on a website
Using keywords from the domain name or meta tags of a website to send signals to search engines.
Organizing content that will make the content easier to crawl, by search engines.
Creating canonical URLs:
Creating links in websites that connect to the best content
Optimizing the text, images, and page content to better align with the search engine’s indexing algorithm.

instruction: Hi, I want to work on my abs and hip flexors. Can you explain how to do a sit up?
demonstration: Sure!  To do a sit-up, you want to start on your back, with your hands behind your head.  Then you’ll lift your upper body, while keeping your back flat on the ground.  To make it easier to get into the position, you can do this:  Start in the first position, with your hands behind your head, and you’ll press your shoulders down against the ground as hard as you can.  Then you’ll tuck your elbows into your sides.  And then, you’ll sit up as high as you can, while keeping your back flat on the ground.  What happens now is your shoulders will lift off the ground, and you can lift your legs straight in the air as you rise.  This will be the end position.  Then you want to return to the starting position and repeat.

instruction: How do I become a good storyteller?
demonstration: I’m very pleased that you want to become a storyteller!  You could start with your experiences in life, and then see if you can connect them to stories about other people or situations.  If you have a child who’s going through a difficult time, you might see that as a challenge or a story.  Or maybe you saw a movie that made an impression on you, or read a book that made you feel moved.  Once you have a beginning, then you can try thinking of details to support the main story and make it more realistic.  You can also make these connections in a way that relates to you, so you’re not telling your whole life story.  Maybe there’s a specific character or problem you want to tell the story around?  If you get stuck at a point, you could ask me to help, and then see if you can’t come up with more of the story.  Stories need to be believable in some way, even if they are hard to believe.  So I think the story that you want to tell must have a reason to be told.  We should also take care to make sure it’s not something people have heard before, or are telling right now,

instruction: I want to know what purpose parentheses serve in an algebraic operation
demonstration:
Well, they can tell you what part of a whole equation to focus on.  For example, you might have an equation like

x = (3 + 4)^2

Where the part inside the parentheses is called the “term”.  Here, you’re solving the “term”

x = (3 + 4)^2

for “x”, and then assigning the result, “x” to be the value in the equation.

instruction: I've read that some places in Texas offer rewards for killing wild boars? Why is this? are they that big of a problem?
demonstration: There are a few reasons. Wild boars are an invasive species, which means that they are not native to North America. They are extremely dangerous to people, and will attack humans if they feel threatened, and have the potential to carry many diseases like the deadly African Swine Fever. Some people simply enjoy hunting, and wild boars are a fairly common and dangerous quarry. A third reason is that wild boars have contributed to the decline of Texas’ native desert species of animals, and they are known to eat tortoises, ground-nesting birds, and lizards, which are also declining in number.

instruction: I've heard sniffing paint is bad for you. Why?
demonstration: Well, a couple of different elements in paint can be toxic or poisonous. There are probably already toxins in the air inside the house, and the stuff you get from paint can be pretty toxic too. Some of it can get into your body if you breathe it or if it gets into your eyes. If you are allergic, then inhaling the paint can trigger an asthma attack. But that only affects a tiny fraction of the population, so it's quite unlikely. Paint-fumes can also cause cancer, but that is a long-term thing, so it is unlikely you'll get cancer from sniffing paint.  This is all really unlikely to happen though, and if you only paint things for a few minutes at a time, you will probably be okay.

instruction: Find the best study techniques for new college students

Studies have shown that our brains are able to learn new information more easily when we are in environments outside of our comfort zone.

instruction: What is a sweet way to tell someone I miss them?

Or if you want to convey an intense emotion, you can describe a strong emotion you’re feeling, like “I’m missing you SO much it hurts!” or “I think of you every day”.

instruction: I am very pale, but I'd like to be tan. What are some of the ways I can get my skin to look tanner?

instruction: How did man discover fire?

instruction: What is inflation and is it bad?
demonstration: Inflation is the speed at which prices are increasing.  Inflation is a normal economic phenomenon. It’s normal to have it to some extent in an economy, and it happens as a result of other factors (such as population growth and productivity growth). However, inflation can sometimes become very high and cause a lot of problems, for example when it’s caused by too much money being pumped into the economy from a central bank, as it has been in the past and is currently.  We don’t have to worry about it too much now, but we can expect to see inflation at higher rates in the future.

instruction: Why am I not as hungry in my 40s

instruction: I have to teach a child who the people are in a court. There are many different people working inside the court room, who are they? Can you help me identify them?
demonstration:
Sure, let’s take a look:

Counsels, accused, and victims:

The Prosecutor is the man who represents the people of the state or nation.

The Defendant is the person accused of committing the crime, and is the person we’re rooting for in the story.

The Prosecutor and Defendant each have their own counsel, who helps them get ready for court.

In court, the Judge, Jury, and Witness are also part of the story, and are “characters” who help drive the narrative.

Each counsel represents one person, so the Prosecutor represents the State or Nation, and the Defendant represents the person accused.

“The Victim” doesn’t exist in the court story.

The Defendant and Prosecutor both represent the other person, so their relationship is like a conflict, and they’re part of the same “side” of the story.

And the Prosecutor and Defendant’s Counsel are the guides who show them the best way to get what they want, so they’re all on the same side.

instruction: Can you tell me about the different types of ballroom dancing?

The waltz is a ballroom dance that’s been around for hundreds of years and has some variations that are even older than that. instruction: I like to host guests at my home from time to time, and I am gathering  recipes of different dishes and drinks to keep things interesting. I am interested in trying some South African  dishes. Can you give me a recipe for Koeksisters?
demonstration:
I’m very happy to help.  Koeksisters is a delicious South African treat. Here’s a simple recipe to get you started:

Get a good pan and put it on high heat. When the pan is hot, add the sugar to the pan. Stir the sugar until it has melted and turned into a caramel. In the meantime, slice the doughnuts in half. Add the doughnuts to the caramel and fry for a few minutes until the doughnuts are cooked and caramelized. Let them cool a little, and then serve. They are best enjoyed warm.

instruction: Have any foods, been shown to fight cancer, in scientific studies?

The research is relatively new, but many of the compounds that are identified in these studies have been extensively studied and can be purchased as supplements. As an example, resveratrol, which is found in red wine and grapes, was studied in 2012. Researchers examined the effect of resveratrol on healthy cell function and DNA damage in a variety of human cells.

instruction: What are some Christmas gifts I can get my daughter since she is a new mom
demonstration:
It is a good idea to try to think of small but thoughtful gifts. Small and thoughtful are generally going to be more meaningful than larger and more complicated, and they are also often less likely to be overwhelming for the recipient. Here are some ideas for inexpensive gifts that a new mom may find useful:

A babysitting service: Having a reliable person to help out during difficult times is probably one of the most useful things in the world. It is not likely that anyone will take on the job, for free, if you don’t have an arrangement with them to do so. To keep it simple, you could ask a friend to come by once a week to help out, and a reasonable rate to do so.

A “baby in a bag”: This is a baby carrier that you can fit inside a bag, and then the carrier comes out to hang on your body. This is helpful when you’re out and about and you have to carry something while holding the baby in the carrier.

Toys and games: Children love playthings, and these are often perfect stocking-stuffer gifts for new parents.

Baby-proofing things: This is a really good one to get her if she is really young,

instruction: I like to host guests at my home from time to time, and I am gathering  recipes of different dishes and drinks to keep things interesting. I am interested in trying some Liberian  dishes. Can you give me a recipe for fufu?
demonstration:
Sure, I have a great one! Fufu is a thick, starchy paste made from cassava. It’s very common in Africa. Fufu is often served with stews like kenkey and gari. Here’s how you can make it:  

To start, you need to prepare the cassava. You should cut it into small chunks, then put it in a pot and cover it with water. You want the pieces to stay in the water, not floating on the top. Cook this for half an hour or until it’s very soft. Once it’s soft, it’s ready to prepare.  You need to wash the cassava and then grate it into a pot. You may want to put gloves on, as the juice from the cassava can be very slippery and get in your skin! Once you’ve grated it, you’ll need to add lots of water, maybe as much as 10 cups. The goal here is to get a fairly thick starchy paste. It should look a lot like oatmeal. You’ll want to add a bit of salt and a bunch of spices. You could add chili pepper, nutmeg, cinnamon, turmeric, ginger, onions, all kinds of stuff! You can also add spinach, fish, chicken, or goat meat.

instruction: I'm taking a trip to Venice, Italy. Can you tell me the popular landmarks and attractions?

demonstration:
I’m happy to help! I can recommend a recipe that comes from a community of people who practice a style of cooking called "Slow Food." They talk about using the best ingredients, and cooking methods that are respectful to the people who farm or make your food. This will help ensure that you are supporting small, local farms and producers, so you know where your food comes from.  Their recipes are also great because they tend to be big, delicious meals, and are inspired by Italian and French food.  This recipe is adapted from one called Stuffed Turkey with Chestnuts, Sage and Apple, from The New York Times:

Ingredients

1 turkey, 20 to 25 pounds

Kosher salt

3 lemons

2 ounces unsalted butter, cut into small cubes

3⁄4 cup dry white wine

3⁄4 cup warm chicken stock

3 tablespoons finely chopped fresh sage

2 garlic cloves, minced

2 apples, peeled and sliced

6 ounces dried chestnuts, soaked overnight in water to cover and drained

1 pound Italian pork sausage, removed from casings

1 pound prosciutto or ham

1 tablespoon unsalted butter

2 small yellow onions, chopped

3 tablespoons chopped fresh parsley

Steps

Preheat oven to 425 degrees F.

Remove giblets from turkey and discard. Pat turkey dry and season liberally inside and out with salt.

Place 2 lemon halves and 1/2 teaspoon salt inside turkey cavity.  Squeeze juice of remaining lemon into a bowl and stir in butter, wine and chicken stock.  Drizzle mixture inside turkey and under skin.  Turn turkey breast side up and push some lemon-salt mixture inside legs.  Tuck in wings under back.  Skewer breast to back with wood skewers.

Place turkey in roasting pan and roast for 1 hour.  Reduce oven to 325 degrees F and roast until juices run clear, about 2 hours and 15 minutes, basting occasionally with pan juices and continuing to use additional lemon juice and butter as needed.

After roasting, remove turkey from oven, take out skewers and allow turkey to rest on a carving board for at least 1 hour.  Let remaining juices in pan drain.

Meanwhile, in a medium saucepan over medium heat, cook chestnuts in 2 tablespoons butter, chopped sage, garlic and 1⁄2 cup stock for about

instruction: How do I get a cat to shed less?
demonstration: You can use a metal comb, available at hardware and pet stores, or a slicker brush. It might take some practice, as cats are often averse to grooming. You can also cut out some of their favorite grooming activities, like baths, and help them to associate those activities with a less-pleasant experience.

instruction: How old do kids need to be before they don't need child car seats anymore?
demonstration: That depends a lot on the child, and on the circumstances, but I'd expect that some kids could outgrow them between the ages of 8-10 years.  And then they could keep using them for up to an additional year, while their bodies finished maturing.  Some kids have also outgrown them much earlier than that, but in the majority of cases, child car seats are safest until the age of ten.

instruction: Can you help me find which president was the first to live in the white house?

instruction: Can animals have mental disorders like humans do? Can a dog, for example, be mentally challenged?
demonstration: Humans and dogs are very different. People don’t think the same way animals do. People don’t see the world in the same ways. Dogs live in a world of smells and sounds and sights, while people have language, and are able to think abstractly and to read and to learn. If you’re asking whether dogs can be depressed, yes. If you’re asking whether dogs can be schizophrenic, no.

instruction: Describe to me the type of work a pediatrician doctor does

instruction: What is companion planting?
demonstration: Companion planting is a type of landscaping in which one type of plant is used to deter or prevent pests that might attack another type of plant.  For example, marigolds are used to deter harmful insects and slugs from attacking vegetables, as a way to avoid spraying chemicals.  When humans first adopted companion planting, their knowledge was based on observing natural growth patterns, and not by testing or “running experiments”.  Today, companion planting is based on specific, scientific information about the pests’ feeding preferences.

instruction: How do I recover from work burnout?
demonstration:
I’m glad you asked!  It’s important to find balance between work and the rest of your life, so you feel recharged and excited to return to work.  Here are three tips I would recommend to you:

1.  Regular exercise or physical activity:  A recent research study showed that a majority of the participants in the study said that regular exercise was one of the best things they did to maintain a sense of physical and mental health.  Also, it’s essential to incorporate at least some physical activity into your daily routine.  Some of the best ways to do this are through walking and cycling, as they help you to maintain your physical fitness while being environmentally-friendly and less damaging to the environment.

2.  Keep a consistent sleep schedule:  It’s especially important to get enough sleep while you’re suffering from burnout.  Getting an early and consistent sleep schedule ensures that your circadian rhythms are in sync, allowing you to function at your best when you need to the most.

3.  Eat healthy food:  Since burnout is often caused by a lack of good nutrition and balanced diet, making sure you’re eating well is important.  Make sure you’

Check whether it works in your country.  If not, please try Worldometers, or maybe have a look at the official data from the EU.  It may be possible to reduce your footprint by using less electricity, or less heating.  You can find out which household appliances use most energy in your country, and how to use them more efficiently.  Is your household paper-free?  Or is there an easier way to go paperless?

instruction: Can you explain how GPS works?
demonstration: Sure.  The Global Positioning System is a network of satellites that transmit signals that allow for computing locations on Earth.  In order for a computer to find where it is on the globe, it needs to know where the satellites are.  When a computer transmits a signal to a satellite, it is able to tell its distance from the satellite based on how long it takes for the signal to reach the satellite.  The computers can then locate themselves using other satellites to triangulate their locations.

instruction: Why are children fearless?
demonstration: A well-known theory is that we all start out life as fearless little bunnies, but then learn that it’s useful to fear things.  Fearing things can protect us from all kinds of dangers.  But research shows that children don’t always learn what to be afraid of until later in life.  So they can continue to be fearless, as long as the things they’re not afraid of aren’t dangerous.  By four years old, they’re generally able to pick up on this.

Try saying something like: “You told me that you were so glad that you’d been given the opportunity to love and be loved by [name of loved one], and I

instruction: How do I make rice krispie treats?

Then, mix in 1/2 cup of miniature marshmallows, 1/2 cup of rice krispies, and 1/2 cup of chocolate chips.  Add 1 tbsp of butter to a small frying pan and warm over medium heat.  When the butter is hot, pour the rice krispie mixture into the pan.  When the mixture starts to bubble, shake the pan.  You can add more marshmallows and chocolate chips if you want.  Then add some mini marshmallows, and watch them melt.  Serve warm.

instruction: Can you give me a guide to identifying edible mushrooms in the Pacific Northwest?
demonstration:
Well, you can’t eat all the mushrooms you see, but here are some which are good to eat:

Basidiomycota (slender caps) include the much-loved matsutake mushrooms and maitake, which are related to the common button mushroom (as is the popular portobello mushroom).

Calvatia and grifola, belonging to the diverse genus Boletus, are brightly colored and recognizable in the Pacific Northwest.

The beautiful Clitocybe, most famous of which are the red or yellow-gilled forms called “Turkey tails”, should not be eaten and is not the same as the edible Clitocybe which is actually more of a cup fungus.  These include the familiar “fairy rings” of bright orange-gills or stems called Cortin

She’s not just one thing, and you can see that in the way she dances, and the way she sings different types of songs, and the way she performs with other musicians. instruction: I'm curious about the painting "The Last Supper" by Leonardo da Vinci. The restoration seems to be going on forever.

The project is intended to restore the original colors and textures. It's due to finish in 2011.

instruction: I want to donate to a charity, but I've heard that some charities don't use the money for what they say they do. How do I find out which charities are worthwhile?
demonstration:
First, it's important to make sure that a charity is really a “charity”, that is, they're not just a tax-write-off for a large business or wealthy individual. There are many charities that are completely legitimate, but this is more difficult to tell if you're not an expert. You can get some advice on that here. 
Beyond that, however, there are some general things that a charity should do, that are independent of the specific cause it supports. A charity should at least be making a big effort to communicate what they are doing with the money you give, and they should provide independent audits of their expenses.  If they don't do those things, there's a strong chance that they are misusing your money, or that they aren't really a charity at all.

instruction: I think I might have seasonal affective disorder. What are the symptoms?

Sure. This website provides a checklist of the symptoms, if you want to check to see if you have any. The list includes things like “tiredness or fatigue”, “feelings of guilt or failure”, “low self-esteem”, “change in appetite or weight”, “sleeping problems or early waking”, and many others. Here’s a sample:

“It's often difficult to work, or concentrate at school, or perform daily activities.”

But for a diagnosis, you need to have all the symptoms listed for at least two weeks.

instruction: Do other countries besides the US celebrate a Thanksgiving day?
demonstration:
Yes, there are many countries that celebrate thanksgiving around the world.  In many countries thanksgiving is on a different date from the United States, but there is some overlap:

Ireland: 1st Thursday of October

China: 3rd lunar month

Italy: 10th November

Canada: 1st Monday of October

Brazil: 20th October

Austria: 10th November

South Korea: 4th October

instruction: I like to host guests at my home from time to time, and I am gathering  recipes of different dishes and drinks to keep things interesting. I am interested in trying some Belgium dishes. Can you give me a recipe for Asparagus a la Flamande?
demonstration:
I think you mean the Belgian dish Asperges aux Laitues, which is, as the name suggests, cooked asparagus with lettuce.  Here’s one recipe I found online:

Serves 4

10 oz. asparagus, trimmed
1 tbsp. butter
2 Tbsp. olive oil
1 cup lightly packed thinly sliced green cabbage
1 cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese
1 cup seasoned bread crumbs
Preheat oven to 400 degrees F (200 degrees C). Butter a 9-inch glass pie plate. Bring a pot of salted water to a boil over high heat.  Add the asparagus and boil gently for about 10 minutes, until bright green. Drain and allow to cool.  Coarsely chop the asparagus. Heat 1 tbsp. each of butter and oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add half of the green cabbage and cook, stirring frequently, until wilted, about 2 minutes. Transfer to a bowl.  Repeat with the remaining oil and cabbage.  Add the green cabbage to the asparagus and stir to combine.   Add the cheese, and then spread the mixture evenly in the prepared pie plate. Mix the bread crumbs and the remaining butter in a small bowl. Sprinkle the crumbs over the asparagus mixture and bake for about 25 minutes, until golden brown.

instruction: How do I find out the minimum insurance coverage I need for a plan?

instruction: Where is the biggest river on earth

They both flow from the Amazon River basin in South America to the Atlantic Ocean.  They are both more than 4,000 miles long.

instruction: Who invented the smartphone?
demonstration:
It was really a collaborative effort. It’s hard to know who to give the credit to, but Steve Jobs, Steve Wozniak, and perhaps some others at Apple have a claim. In the early years, it was mainly a series of refinements on a feature of a phone called the “Handspring Visor PDA” from Psion, the “PDA”. This was an early hand-held touch-screen computer with wireless networking. Jobs and Wozniak later used their experience with PDA’s to create the Macintosh computer.

But the design of the iPhone in particular also had elements of a phone which was created in Finland, the “Nokia E90 Communicator”.

instruction: What happened to the Mars bar candy? All I see are Snickers now!

The sap that flows from the trees is collected in buckets, placed under the spouts of the taps that drain the tree and, after letting it sit for a short time to separate the tree sap from the woody material, is collected in wooden barrels,

instruction: What is an LLC?
demonstration: What an interesting question!  A Limited Liability Company, or LLC for short, is a business entity.  It has some special legal rights and responsibilities, just like a corporation.  A LLC can be structured as a single-owner business, or as a partnership.

instruction: How do you use credit card reward points?
demonstration: Some credit card reward programs allow you to exchange points for specific things like travel, which you can view by choosing “My rewards” on the applicable website. You can also use your points to earn a free night at a hotel, or in some cases a plane ticket.

instruction: I have been told that storing cut onions in a plastic container in the fridge will cause that container to always smell like onions even after I wash it. So I store cut onions in a plastic Ziploc bag. I would rather store them in plastic containers. Is this a true thing or is it made up?
demonstration: Hm, a smell from plastic, huh. I don’t think I’ve ever heard of that. But there are many kinds of plastics with many different properties, and the plastic used in containers like Tupperware isn’t exactly known for being chemically inert. Some plastic containers do release smells, and it’s not uncommon to smell those for weeks after you empty them.  You might get a smell from the plastic container even if you wash it very well.  But I think the bigger question is, do you really care about this smell? Is it worth putting up with a new smell every week to get to use plastic containers?  If you do want to store your onions in plastic containers, I would definitely get one made of PET plastic instead of PVC, as PET plastic doesn’t give off any smell.

instruction: What are ways that I can practice being open minded?

Well perhaps if you think about it, you’ve had many times in the past when you’ve found that having a flexible view of the world really helps you get your work done.

instruction: How do I know if my computer has a virus?

In general, there are two categories of viruses - macro viruses and macro worms.  Do you think you have any viruses or worms?  I also wouldn’t consider an adware problem a virus

instruction: Hey! I have some friends who only wash their hair once or twice a week. I hear that this is better for my overall hair health but my hair only stays looking good for 1-2 days and then it looks greasy and dried out. Is there any strategies you have for me to keep my hair healthier between washes?
demonstration: I am glad to hear that your friends are keeping their hair so healthy! But I do think that you should go for a wash once a week. This is when the dirt from the hair follicles is scraped off, which is where dirt and oil is stored. I think the greasy look you describe is probably from the natural oils in your scalp leaking out, which are produced in a healthy scalp. But if you shampoo your hair every day, there isn’t enough time for these oils to build up and stick to the hair follicles, and also a lot of your natural oils will be washed off.

instruction: Are prepaid debit cards safe?
demonstration: A debit card is basically a type of credit card that is designed to let a person withdraw money from a bank account.  They differ from credit cards in that you typically don’t have to pay a monthly service fee, and they are more convenient for some people.  However, like credit cards, prepaid debit cards can be misused by criminals who might steal them and try to spend your money.  If you think you’ve been the victim of theft, I recommend checking with the bank that issued your debit card to see what steps to take next.

instruction: What are the symptoms of the coronavirus?
demonstration:
Coronaviruses are a family of viruses that includes the common cold, and they can also infect people and cause respiratory disease.  They can also infect people’s noses and throats.  These infections are much more common in the summer, when humidity is higher, and when people spend more time near each other indoors and breathe in air, which has a lot of viruses in it.

The current coronavirus is part of this family of viruses.  The common symptoms are fever, dry cough, fatigue, shortness of breath, and loss of taste or smell.  It is important to be aware that these symptoms could be caused by something other than coronavirus.  But if you think you might be infected, it’s important to be seen by a health care provider, and you should definitely stay home if you have a fever or other symptoms, and have contact with a person who has a confirmed case of the virus.

instruction: I would like to visit Japan, can you recommend it?

If you visit Japan, you should definitely plan to travel to Tokyo, as that is the largest and most interesting city.  I would also recommend also visiting Kyoto, Nara, and/or Hakone.

instruction: I'd like to look at new art. Are there any Art Deco artists you recommend?
demonstration: Do you mean the period from around the 1920s through the 1940s, with forms influenced by the prewar avant-garde?  That was a time in which many European and American artists were going to Paris and other places in Europe to see modern art, and the interest in that led to these trends where artists designed objects and environments using more colorful styles, often with less focus on perspective and naturalism.  Some of the most famous examples are Tiffany lamps and the metal-mesh ceilings in the Woolworth Building in New York.

instruction: I'm thinking about getting a motorcycle. How much more dangerous is driving a motorcycle than a car?

instruction: I know that going for walks is good for the body. But I am trying to determine which time of the day I should walk. What are some reasons as to why starting the day out with a walk is better than later in the day?
demonstration: In the morning, there is not much stress built up from the previous day, but the muscles in your legs are likely to be well rested and flexible. You also likely have more time and energy for exercising, especially if you aren’t under time pressure. If the day is planned, you also may not have to take time out of your day to plan and prepare for your walk.

instruction: What is the best way to get a tattoo removed?
