instruction: Is there any advantage to shopping in person versus online?
demonstration: There are lots of advantages to shopping in person.  You can experience the colors and textures of the products in person, and try on clothes to get the size right and get a feel for how they fit.  You also see whether or not you like the style and fit.  There’s a social aspect of shopping too.  You can buy something and get compliments on how it looks or on the item itself.  You can ask advice and get opinions from shop owners.  Some people actually prefer to shop in person even though there are other options.  For example, I prefer to shop in person, and there are things that I would rather do online than in person.  Maybe it’s because of the social aspects that I like shopping in person, or maybe it’s because I like to feel the item.  Do you have a preference?  If so, why?

instruction: Is electric propulsion ever going to be used on spacecrafts?
demonstration: Electric propulsion can be used for both craft in orbit and for craft traveling in space, but we don’t really know when electric propulsion will be used on spacecrafts, since there are several competing technologies.  For instance, there are a lot of proposals that involve huge solar sails to help spacecrafts travel in space.  It also depends on which missions you’re talking about: for short-term missions, like sending a probe to another planet, electric propulsion might be practical, but for long-term missions, like travel to another star system, even massive nuclear power plants won’t be enough, so either electrical propulsion won’t be practical or nuclear rockets are required.

instruction: Can you explain the argument for doing away with daylight savings time?
demonstration: Sure, daylight savings time shifts the start and end times for the day an hour, but it is always the case that the sum of the hours in a 24-hour day is always 24. So if we shift the times by an hour, we’ll have the same number of hours in the day. For example, if we started our days an hour later, it would mean our days would be 24 hours, 9 minutes long. If we end our days an hour earlier, then the number of hours in the day will be 24 hours, 10 minutes long.

But it’s very important to practice a lot in order to become a good fisherman.  Some of the most common types of fish in lakes are:

Brook Trout (Brown Trout)

Muskie

Northern Pike

Rock Bass

Smallmouth Bass

Smallmouth Bass, aka "Largemouth Bass"

Catfish

To go fishing, you will also need some fishing line.  The kind of fishing line you use will be a question of personal taste.  In general, a heavier fishing line is better for catching larger fish.  Sinkers, weights, and lures are common to have on the line when fishing.  To avoid tangling your line and getting lost, you can tie a coil to your fishing rod. instruction: How does a camera capture images?
demonstration: This is a great question. The sensors on a camera are usually on the inside, facing towards the subject. Light enters through the lens and strikes a grid of thousands of sensors. Each sensor is sensitive to the light that hits it, and when a light sensor is struck, an electrical charge is triggered.  The electric charge is passed to a processor, where it is recorded and stored. The sensor then gets ready to take another light hit, and the cycle starts again.

instruction: What are instruction for making a helium balloon for a party?
demonstration:
In my mind I am imagining the process would go like this:

You would take a cylinder of helium, called the balloon, and attach a smaller, empty cylinder called a neck to the end of the balloon. This neck can have a “flap” that closes when the balloon is not inflated, so that the balloon can be inserted into the neck.  Then a string is attached to the balloon through the neck, and the other end is attached to a large fan.  The fan will “blow” air through the helium cylinder, which will turn the helium to gas and expand the balloon.  If the neck has a flap and the balloon has been in a flame, it is not likely that the flap will open by accident as the balloon inflates.

instruction: I like to host guests at my home from time to time, and I am gathering  recipes of different dishes and drinks to keep things interesting. I am interested in trying some Ecuadorian dishes. Can you give me a recipe for Fanesca?
demonstration:
Fanesca is a national dish of Ecuador, with ingredients similar to those of French or Italian cuisine. It’s delicious, so I can’t say anything negative about it! I like the fun ambiance of setting up a table with a white tablecloth, flowers, glasses, and matching plates.  This is definitely a good opportunity to set the mood, and create the sense of a traditional dining experience! Fanesca can be made with beef, chicken, pork, or fish, and you can dress it up in a number of ways.  For example, you might serve it with a tomato-based sauce (which is typically less spicy than some Ecuadorian sauces). You might use coconut milk or a cream sauce. You might use a whole fish to serve.  What you like, and what you want to emphasize, is up to you.  
Fanesca isn’t hard to make. The recipe I’ll give you for this is adapted from a blog post on kuriad.com, which is a collection of recipes from around the world.  We can do a recipe search for more original recipes and references if you’d like.  The secret is that you just throw it all together into a pot and let it cook for a few hours.  It tastes even better the next day.

instruction: I am doing a report on animals that can jump high. What are some specific animals that have the highest leap span relative to their height/length?
demonstration:
Good question!  I’ll do my best to answer.  

 There are two main ways to measure the “jumping distance” of a human or animal.  The first way is to look at the distance a human or animal jumps from the standing position.  The second is to look at how high they jump relative to their body height or length.  

The first is quite easy.  For example, the jumping distance of humans is limited by how strong our legs and muscles are.  Our knee joint is basically built to move and to support about 20 to 30 inches of vertical jump.  We call this our “maximum jumping height”.  If we measure the height of an athlete, we’ll see that at times they’ve done more than 30 inches.  But it’s really important to remember that the height of the jump is just half of the whole measure.  

For a typical human, if we measure the length of a person’s body, we find they are usually about 5.5 feet.  Let’s call that “body height” for now.  
So the maximum jumping distance we can do will be about 10.5 feet.  This can be done only when we have a vertical jump of more than 30 inches, since half of 10.5 feet is 5.5 feet.  

Another way to measure is to do something similar to the first, but looking at how high you can jump, which is just your body height, and adding the distance of how high you jump to it.  You’d have to figure out the actual vertical jump of your body by doing some jumps in a special device which measures the exact distance of how high you jumped.  It’s really hard to do, and would require

instruction: Is it better to pay with a debit card or credit card for online purchases?
demonstration: I would say that it depends on the situation, the merchant, and what you’re purchasing.  For example, if you’re using an app on your phone, or if you’re buying from a website, I would recommend paying with a credit card.  This is because credit cards are tied to your personal data, and they often have better protections, so if anything goes wrong, the vendor might be less likely to try to blame you for the mistake.  In contrast, with a debit card, you’re essentially letting the vendor be your bank.  This means they have more power over you, and if they try to blame you for the mistake, it might be much harder for you to dispute the charge or collect compensation.

instruction: What are the things I should do to best protect my data on my computer? Is an anti-virus enough?
demonstration:
Sure, that’s a great first step. The problem is that there are various types of data, and they might be located in different places on your computer.  What I can do is go over the most important things to look out for:

1.  Make sure you have a current antivirus.  Virus/malware definitions need to be updated frequently, because new viruses come out all the time.
2.  Be especially wary of attachments to emails that are from unknown senders.  Viruses and malware are often spread this way.
3.  Use two-factor authentication for all of your accounts on things like your email, Facebook, Google, Dropbox, etc.
4.  Create a strong, complex password for all of your accounts, and change it every couple of months.
5.  Encrypt all of your files, even your documents.
6.  Check your credit card statements regularly.
7.  Keep your home computer separate from your work computer (or phones) that you use at work.
8.  Keep your mobile phones in a separate location than your computers.
9.  Delete old versions of files if you can, like Word documents.  You can usually right-click on

instruction: How can I treat sore thighs from running?
demonstration:
Running is a fantastic workout, and most people will get sore legs at first.  After a few runs, you’ll find that your muscles and skin toughen up and you can go further and run faster.  There are some basic things you can do that will help you get better faster:

1.  Ice baths, where you fill a large bath tub with water, add ice, and soak your legs in the bath for ten to fifteen minutes.  This will make the skin and muscles tighter, and will help them heal faster.
2.  Massage.  Most people are not good at self-massage, but with a little practice you can rub your muscles to ease pain, and speed healing.
3.  Wearing compression clothing can help prevent chafing, while also giving a bit of added support for your muscles and joints.
4.  If you do a lot of running, it’s a good idea to invest in a new pair of shoes every few months.  Runners often put a lot of stress on the plantar fascia, which is a small and often ignored tendon that stretches from the bottom of the foot up to the base of the toes.  You can protect it with a new pair of shoes, as well as some custom orthotics for your feet that might be recommended by a physical therapist.  New shoes can also be more comfortable.
5.  Take care of your feet.  Runners usually end up getting heel blisters, or some form of calluses on their feet.  You can relieve this by massaging the bottom of your feet and applying antiseptic cream, or you can get insoles to make it more comfortable.  Good shoes can also help.
6.  If you’re getting hip and knee pain, it’s worth seeing a doctor for some exercises and advice.  Your joints are weak, and stretching and warm-up exercises can be especially important.

instruction: How do I take a power nap?

instruction: When did yeasted bread become popular in culture? Also, did indigenous people of the U.S., use yeasted bread?

Bread molds were also used around this time to bake flatbreads, that is, yeast-free bread.  Native Americans used bread molds to make flatbreads.  This website has some really great images that you might find interesting.

Or you could have a meal that is just “family style”, with a potluck arrangement and everyone brings an entree to

instruction: I like to host guests at my home from time to time, and I am gathering  recipes of different dishes and drinks to keep things interesting. I am interested in trying some Sri Lankan dishes. Can you give me a recipe for Gotukola Sambol?
demonstration:
Sure, I can certainly try. Let me think.

So gotu kola is a herb from the Indian subcontinent that has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for thousands of years. It can also be used as a spice in cooking. It is considered to be extremely nutritious and was a source of many important nutrients for an impoverished population in Sri Lanka. It has no calories, and is high in many essential vitamins and minerals. It is a dark green leaf, about 6 inches in length.

Gotu kola has a distinct taste and aroma and a slightly bitter aftertaste. Some people enjoy this flavor in very small quantities, or others can not stand it at all.

Gotu Kola Sambol is usually made by blending gotu kola leaves with vinegar and salt, and then adding a little water. A food processor would make this process very easy.

A very common and popular side dish in Sri Lanka, gotu kola sambol is best served fresh, and it can be found in almost every Sri Lankan household. It is very healthy and is eaten with rice, chapattis, curries, vegetable dishes, and sometimes even fish or meat.

Gotu kola is usually made with the leaves of the plant only. It is always freshly ground and never stored. It is often served with a dash of salt. You can also add chilli powder or other spices to make a flavorful spicy sambol. There are even sambols flavored with cardamom and other spices that add a special flavor.

Gotu kola is a very useful plant. The leaves contain an active chemical ingredient that works as an anti-inflammatory agent, which can help relieve pain and swelling of inflamed joints, muscles and nerves. Other studies have shown that it has been shown to be effective in healing ulcers.

People also use gotu kola to reduce fever, fight stress, aid blood circulation, as well as improving memory and cognition.

Gotu kola is also used as a health tonic and to maintain good health and improve the overall appearance of the skin.

Sambol is a very popular side dish in Sri Lanka, and can be prepared using many different vegetables. As it is served with almost all the meals, including breakfast, dinner, lunch and supper. Sambol is made with green chilies and is a versatile dish that can be used to season or

instruction: What is the origin of pizza?

The main series games are the most prolific and well-known. There are, however, also spin-offs that are just as enjoyable and have had varying levels of popularity. The second-generation games are part of a major storyline that is so convoluted that its only coherent for the original creators. instruction: What are some other composers to look into if I like Benjamin Britten?
demonstration:
Rachmaninov is a favorite for many people, and many consider that his “eternal lament” in particular to be one of the best pieces in the classical repertoire.  
Prokofiev is a close contemporary of Britten, and it’s hard to listen to him and not hear Rachmaninov in his music.  He is much more driven and aggressive, though, and not as well-known as Rachmaninov.  The violin concerto he wrote for Shostakovich is a staple of many orchestras’ concerts.

Debussy is one of the giants of 20th century music, and many modern composers consider him to be an “unfair rival”.  He’s much more interesting for many people as a musician than as a composer, as he loved music so much that he often didn’t bother writing down what he heard.

Reger is much older than Britten, and was actually one of the first composers to write for the piano.  His music can sound incredibly stiff and stilted, as he was convinced that a “proper” technique was the secret to good music.  Britten has described listening to him as “scary”, so there are certainly elements of his style you can find in Britten’s work as well.  To some, Reger’s “Rhenish” pieces are the best part of his work.

Bartok is one of the best-known Hungarian composers, and he definitely shows up in Britten’s music.  Many consider him one of the great composers of the 20th century.

-------

instruction: Can you tell me what the best time of the day is to water the plants in my garden?
demonstration: Well, during the day most of the rain drops on your plants will evaporate very quickly. So it’s probably best to water them during the night or in the early morning, when the air is still moist and less water will be lost. The best time to water is probably just before sunrise. This is because your plants’ roots will have grown to their greatest length during the night, and will need to spread out and absorb water from the soil more than usual, to compensate.

instruction: Can you provide me with a peach cobble recipe?
demonstration:
Yes, here it is: 

Peach Cobbler with Brown Sugar

Yield: serves 6-8

2 1/2 cups peeled and chopped fresh peaches

1 cup sugar

1/4 cup all purpose flour

1/2 cup melted butter

1/3 cup milk

Preheat the oven to 350F. Grease a 9”x13” baking dish.

Mash the peaches in a large bowl with a potato masher or large fork.

Mix in the sugar, flour, butter and milk. Spoon the peach mixture into the baking dish.

Bake at 350F for 35 minutes or until the filling is bubbling. Serve warm.

Here’s what it might look like:

1 chicken
2 sweetbreads
5 chorizos
3 bolivian sausages

Here’s how to prepare the meat:

Marinate meat in a mixture of 1 cup olive oil, 1/2 cup red wine, 1 onion, 6 garlic cloves, 1 bunch parsley, 1 tablespoon vinegar, 1 teaspoon salt, 1 teaspoon pepper, and 1 teaspoon oregano. 
Meanwhile, prepare the vegetables and the rest of the sauce. Here’s a list of the vegetables you might like to add to the dish:

2 onions
4 potatoes
2 green tomatoes

3 capsic

instruction: When was stainless steel invented?
demonstration: Stainless steel, the modern alloy made by chemical techniques, was invented in the late 19th century by accident by two scientists, S. P. Lavoisier and H. Acheson, at the La Chaux-de-Fonds works of the Société Le Nickel in Switzerland. The workers at the factory noticed that the machine for working the iron failed to rust while the buildings next to it, made of a previous iron alloy, were rusted. Lavoisier’s assistants investigated and quickly discovered that adding nickel to the iron, while still in an alloy with carbon, inhibited the process of rusting.

instruction: Can you help me understand how lightning forms?
demonstration:
There are three main reasons for lightning:

The first is that static electricity is built up during thunderstorms.  When the sky is full of charged particles (called “ions”), the atmosphere becomes charged. When the electric field gets strong enough, electrons will move from negative to positive.  These electrons make up the cloud’s electric field, which is pushing on other electrons in the cloud and making them move.

Lightning is also caused by the flow of electric current.  When charged particles flow through a medium, they will spread out.  Once the electrons spread out into a big cloud, a lot of them will try to flow towards each other.  The movement of the electrons is what you call an electric current.

When the electric current grows really strong, there will be an electric field around it that pushes the electrons forward.  This is called a “loud” electric current.  It takes more and more energy to push the electrons forward.  Eventually, the electrons start moving forward so fast that they bump into atoms and knock other electrons loose.  These electrons also begin moving with the current, and the process continues.  This is called a “strike.”  After a little while, the electrons run out of

instruction: How do I teach science in a hands on way?
demonstration:
Do you mean just teaching students about concepts in science?  You could probably take some content that students learn in school, and help them form more real-world connections to it, as opposed to just memorizing it.  Maybe start by doing some experiments to demonstrate something to them?  Or help them think about the conceptual implications of something they’ve learned?  

For example, you might want to take students to a museum that has some hands-on things to explore.  And then you could help them form their own conceptual understandings about the phenomena they’re observing.  I know some students might not want to learn about science, but maybe you could think of some activities that are a good match for them?  Or you could form connections between the scientific principles that students are learning and things they’re already interested in.

instruction: What are some other composers to look into if I like Benjamin Britten?
demonstration:
Rachmaninov is a favorite for many people, and many consider that his “eternal lament” in particular to be one of the best pieces in the classical repertoire.  
Prokofiev is a close contemporary of Britten, and it’s hard to listen to him and not hear Rachmaninov in his music.  He is much more driven and aggressive, though, and not as well-known as Rachmaninov.  The violin concerto he wrote for Shostakovich is a staple of many orchestras’ concerts.

Debussy is one of the giants of 20th century music, and many modern composers consider him to be an “unfair rival”.  He’s much more interesting for many people as a musician than as a composer, as he loved music so much that he often didn’t bother writing down what he heard.

Reger is much older than Britten, and was actually one of the first composers to write for the piano.  His music can sound incredibly stiff and stilted, as he was convinced that a “proper” technique was the secret to good music.  Britten has described listening to him as “scary”, so there are certainly elements of his style you can find in Britten’s work as well.  To some, Reger’s “Rhenish” pieces are the best part of his work.

Bartok is one of the best-known Hungarian composers, and he definitely shows up in Britten’s music.  Many consider him one of the great composers of the 20th century.

instruction: how do i know if my baby has jaundice?
demonstration: Jaundice, sometimes called “the yellow disease”, is the yellowing of the skin and the whites of the eyes.  It’s typically a symptom of infection, but it can also occur in babies whose systems aren’t yet making enough bilirubin.  In most cases, a doctor or a nurse can diagnose jaundice by examining your baby’s skin.

instruction: I have a project on ancient greece and need some ideas for headings for each chapter. I will need about 6 chapters/

OK, let’s start with the next to last section, it will give you a chance to introduce the sources and go over the general theme of the story. The last chapter will discuss more specific examples of the theme, and it will give you a chance to tie up some loose ends and mention any themes from the book.  The following is the outline that I would suggest:

-   Introduction - the name of the story
-   1. “Secrets of the Gods” - the source material (e.g. Herodotus)
-   2. Telling the tales - the theme (e.g. of gods vs. mortals)
-   3. Threat to the Gods - The gods of ancient greece (also 1. 4. 5. 6. 7.)
-   4. Life in ancient greece
-   5. “Those who know the tales”
-   6. Stories about heroes
-   7. Storytellers (4. 5. 6.)
-   8. Sources
-   9. Close

instruction: How do you treat a cold sore?
demonstration: For minor symptoms such as itching or discomfort, over-the-counter remedies like lysine, calamine lotion, or petroleum jelly can provide relief. I’ve also seen a few other remedies used. A paste made from chamomile flowers or the juice of a raw onion can both be applied directly to the area to provide temporary relief. Pomegranate juice can be applied to the sore by swabbing a cotton ball soaked in the juice directly onto the sore. A traditional remedy for oral herpes includes soaking the area in warm water for a few minutes, or applying a hot compress of an oil, such as sesame, olive, or coconut oil, which can reduce itchiness.

instruction: What are some games that are similiar to Cyberpunk 2077?
demonstration:
I can start with listing the names of some games that share similar gameplay elements, but I’d rather focus on why Cyberpunk 2077 is different from other games, rather than just listing games that are similar.  These differences are particularly important because of the current political climate.  
In Cyberpunk 2077, it’s essential that players not interact with NPCs if they want to stay alive. This makes the game more challenging, as players must constantly think about how to strategically avoid the NPCs that are dangerous to them.  This is much more interesting than simply fighting an NPC, where a player’s success is mainly dependent on how strong they are, rather than how they choose to interact with an NPC.

The general story of the game is also very different from other games.  In Cyberpunk 2077, all the characters and NPCs can be easily manipulated and can be used for mutually beneficial arrangements with the players.  This makes the game more interesting, because you have more freedom to interact with NPCs and develop mutually beneficial relationships with them.  

This was a great game to play if you liked the 2017 movie, because the game feels like the movie.  The game starts with you as a prisoner in the New Angeles Police Department (NAPD).  The police just want to jail you for being a hacker.  You don’t know if there’s any justice to this, but then your

instruction: I just got a pool and want to throw a pool party. Can you give me tips?
demonstration:
Sure, a pool party is a lot of fun, so here are some helpful tips for your party:

-Provide plenty of towels, and other things to help people dry off after they swim.

-Offer lots of food, and set it up in a way that helps people easily choose what they’d like to eat.

-Keep the party going by throwing a small party every so often.

-If you know a lot of people, just have some people bring food and drinks, and make it easier for everyone to get everything they need.

-Have a lot of activities for people to do. There are lots of things you can try. Some options: playing games like volleyball, or having people play music for people to dance to.

-You could have some fun things, like putting on a movie, or having a bonfire.

-If you have a pool and plenty of room, have people bring their own water toys and flotation devices to the party. It’s a fun way to make the pool more fun for everyone.

-If you’re interested in playing, you can throw a mini-golf course in your backyard, or build a shack for some fun games.

-The pool is a nice place to relax and cool off after playing a game. You can provide lots of comfortable things to sit on, and drink on, like coolers or chairs and tables.

-You can have an outdoor kitchen if you don’t want people to have to cook at the party.

instruction: What is a good family road trip in California?
demonstration:
A good family road trip in California, like a family trip anywhere, is going to depend on a lot of different things.  The trip will be a lot more fun if everyone in your family agrees on what kind of trip to take.  One thing that’s good for a family trip is that it is overnighter or multiple nights.  When traveling over long distances, taking an overnight, or several nights, is more time efficient and more comfortable.  For example, a trip from Sacramento to LA, or from SF to LA would be better suited for overnight than a day trip.  Or you could drive up to Sacramento and then go to Sacramento via driving over the Altamont Pass, which is along a part of the old US-101.  For a longer road trip, driving out through the desert and across the Mojave Desert can be an option.  

Another thing to think about is the amount of time you can dedicate to a road trip.  If you have a fixed amount of time for the road trip, like 3 days or 2 nights, you might want to travel to a more far off destination, because you can travel faster on the interstate highways.  If you have more flexible time to travel, and want to

instruction: I like to host guests at my home from time to time, and I am gathering  recipes of different dishes and drinks to keep things interesting. I am interested in trying some Sicilian dishes. Can you give me a recipe for Peperonata?
demonstration:
Peperonata is a delicious dish. Here’s a recipe from Sicilian Cookbook.

Ingredients:

1 large red onion, sliced
1 lb. small zucchini, sliced
4 Roma tomatoes, cored and chopped
3 cloves garlic, chopped
1/2 tsp. red pepper flakes
salt
ground black pepper

Method:

1. Heat the oil over medium high heat and sauté the garlic for 30 seconds, add the onion and zucchini and cook for 10 minutes.
2. Add the red pepper flakes, chopped tomatoes, and the salt and pepper to taste. Reduce heat to medium low and cook for another 10 minutes.
3. Adjust the seasoning, remove from heat, and serve warm.

instruction: Find coconut rice noodle recipe

Ingredients:

1 cup jasmine rice (uncooked)

4 cups water

1/2 cup palm sugar

Pinch of salt

2 tbsp. of fish sauce

1 tsp. of soy sauce

1 tsp. of tamarind

2 tbsp. of crushed peanuts

1 tbsp. of white sugar

1 tbsp. of cooking oil

1. Wash and soak rice in hot water for 15 minutes.

2. Pour into a pot with 4 cups of water.

3. Bring to a boil then lower to simmer.

4. Cook for about 15 minutes, until cooked.

5. Mixture is now like a porridge-type consistency. Remove from heat and let it stand for another 5 minutes.

6. Mix the palm sugar, soy sauce, fish sauce and tamarind into the rice.

7. Transfer the rice to a plate. Put to one side while you make the sauce.

8. Pour the cooking oil into a pot and add crushed peanuts and sugar.

2. Meanwhile, heat oil in large pot over medium heat. Add onion, leeks and garlic; sauté, stirring occasionally, until onion is soft, about 5 minutes. Add broth and potatoes and simmer until potato is tender, about 20 minutes.

instruction: Can you hep me with a cocktail recipe that contains coffee?
demonstration: Sure, I can help with that! What kind of cocktail do you want?

instruction: What are ways to comfort someone that has lost a pet?
demonstration: You could say a few supportive things and touch their shoulder. You might share a story from your own past experiences with pets. You could offer to call the pet’s vet to find out more about how to help a grieving pet. Or you could make something comforting to eat or drink and share it with your friend, if that feels appropriate.

instruction: I suffer from migraine headaches and they seem to be getting worse. When I get one, I'm out of commission for a couple days and nothing seems to help. I've seen doctors and tried different medication, but to no avail.
demonstration: I'm sorry to hear about your migraines. I wonder if you have considered the possibility of getting a brain scan? Have you done a search for this yet?

instruction: Do other countries besides the US celebrate a Thanksgiving day?
demonstration:
Yes, there are many countries that celebrate thanksgiving around the world.  In many countries thanksgiving is on a different date from the United States, but there is some overlap:

Ireland: 1st Thursday of October

China: 3rd lunar month

Italy: 10th November

Canada: 1st Monday of October

Brazil: 20th October

Austria: 10th November

South Korea: 4th October

instruction: Which brand of shoe should I buy for running?
demonstration: Do you plan to wear them for running?

instruction: The painting of The Son of Man by Rene Magritte, is odd. Do you know it?
demonstration: I do, actually.  It’s from 1964.  Let’s see.  It shows a face with the words: C’est peut-être cela, la tragédie de l’homme — C’est qu’il ne connait pas de quoi il s’occupe. (It may be this, the tragedy of man — It’s that he doesn’t know what he’s up to).  It’s an odd painting, because it could mean that the world is meaningless or it could mean that the only tragedy is man’s ignorance.  I suppose it’s possible the latter, but the painting can be interpreted both ways.  Magritte was a surrealist artist, so his paintings often can be interpreted in multiple ways.  What were you looking for in the painting?  Why did it make you think of the “tragedy of man”?  I can also tell you that the painting was exhibited at the 1966 Rêve d’un art poétique, d’une esthétique de l’imaginaire in Brussels, Belgium.  I hope that helps!

instruction: What is a touchdown in american football?
demonstration: Sorry, I don’t know!  I’m not human, but I’d be happy to learn more about American football, and if you’d like to try your question with a human, they can give you an even better answer.

instruction: What are some cool things to do while in Europe?
demonstration: Well, there are tons of great things to see and do in Europe.  I’d suggest that you begin by visiting museums, art galleries, or perhaps parks with architectural and sculptural elements.

instruction: How should I clean a bird cage?
demonstration: Clean the inside of the bird cage using a broom, and also a spray bottle or rag and water.

instruction: How do I get stains out of clothing?
demonstration: Hmm, why don’t you show me what you have, and we can figure something out?

instruction: What are symptoms of progeria?
demonstration: Progeria is a genetic disease which can cause premature ageing and death.  For children with progeria the symptoms are thinning hair, large hands and feet, loose skin, dry eyes, dry mouth, loss of skin elasticity, and heart problems.

instruction: I want to visit New Zealand.  Please tell me about it.
demonstration: New Zealand is a fascinating place.  Its beautiful landscapes, unique flora and fauna, a safe and welcoming country, and some of the most attractive beaches in the world.  The friendly locals are also noted for their hospitality and generosity.  It is also home to several indigenous tribes, each with its own distinctive culture.  The economy is currently growing rapidly and while the population density is relatively low, this gives the country a stunning quality of life.  Finally, the country has a thriving hospitality industry with many options for activities, from diving to kite surfing, hiking, rafting, skiing, fishing, and more.  If you are looking for the perfect vacation getaway, New Zealand should be top of your list.

instruction: What is veterans day?
demonstration: Veterans Day is an occasion to celebrate all the servicemen and servicewomen who served in the US Armed Forces, which includes all branches of the United States Military such as Army, Navy, Air Force, Marines, and Coast Guard.

instruction: I'm supposed to go jogging in an hour but we have a severe thunderstorm warning. I'll be jogging in a suburban neighborhood. Is it safe to go out in a thunderstorm?
demonstration: I don't have a weather radar so it's hard to say exactly what's going on. If it's very severe and there are sustained lightning strikes, it's probably best to get inside. Of course that could mean driving to the gym, or finding an indoor workout you can do, or doing some sort of very low-intensity cardio like housework or walking. The local weather forecasters probably have a better sense of what the situation is in your neighborhood.

instruction: When was the Veterans Day first celebrated?
demonstration: The Congressional Act of 1938, establishing the date of “Armistice Day” to be commemorated on November 11th each year, was signed by President Roosevelt on May 13, 1938.

instruction: What does the grocery store do with all the expired food they have every month.
demonstration: I have no idea, I have never been to a grocery store before.  Maybe I could find out and report back later.

instruction: I was wondering how pizza dough is different than Indian flat bread? Are the recipes different?
demonstration: They’re basically the same. But in India there is a centuries-long tradition of using the phutka (or “flatbread” or “naan” in English) as a platform for a variety of garnishes. Indians are quite ingenious about how they use food, and often will pack flavorful fillings into the naan.

instruction: What are some good streaming mediums?
demonstration: My suggestions are Netflix, Hulu, and HBO Now.

instruction: How can I help red and sore eyes?
demonstration: Good question!  I can’t offer a “definitive answer” about how to fix your eyes, because there is no such thing.  You’d have to try different approaches to see what works best for you!

instruction: Help support a child that is being bullied.
demonstration: Are you the child who is being bullied, or someone who can help the child?

instruction: A friend returned from a vacation in Italy a while back. She had all kinds of artisan glass. Does Italy have a specialty in glass art?
demonstration: If you mean traditional blown glass artistry, I would say that is a specialty of Venice, where you can buy much of the fine glass art seen at markets in Venice, but it’s also available in other areas of Italy. There are many other areas of Italian artistry that are world famous for both being art forms and being produced in Italy, and I could describe more if you wish.

instruction: What does blue lives matter?
demonstration: Blue lives matter is a movement that challenges the systemic racism in the United States criminal justice system.  They campaign for nonviolent reforms to address the injustice of over-policing black and Latinx communities.

instruction: What are signs that wiper blades on a car have gone bad?
demonstration: Wiper blades should be replaced regularly, as a car’s headlights. They gradually lose their effectiveness, due to oxidation, or mineral build-up, which distorts the light beam. Some places that need checking include the blades, blade guides, and the drive belts that connect the wipers to the car’s drive motor.   The wiper blades might need to be replaced if they’re cracked, have wear and tear, or if they’re chipped or glazed.   You can look for these signs of wear and tear with the use of a flashlight to see that the edges are either missing or chipped.  If the guides are clogged, then they might have accumulated dust or debris.  Once these changes are detected, it is likely that the wipers are starting to lose their effectiveness.

instruction: What are things to do in Tucson, AZ?
demonstration: In Tucson, there are lots of interesting historical buildings.  For example, the Old Pueblo, now called the Historic Center, is where many people lived during the Spanish and Mexican periods, and some of those buildings remain, like the O.K. Corral, where there is a museum.  There are also many art galleries and museums, as well as nice parks, and lots of restaurants and bars.  The University of Arizona is nearby, and there are some exciting summer festivals, like Pride in the Desert, Fourth Avenue Street Fair, and the Tucson Folk Festival.  Have fun exploring Tucson!

instruction: How can I get a horse to trust me?
demonstration: Humans and horses are different species.  Horses, like many other domestic animals, tend to be wary and cautious of humans, and need to be trained and socialized.  You’ll want to start by learning how to approach and handle horses safely, by practicing with smaller and friendlier horses, and getting coaching on how to use the right equipment and safety equipment like helmets.  Then as you advance, you’ll want to work with different horses to learn what they respond to and what they don’t like.  Horses are creatures of habit and want consistency in their routines, so any effort you make to make a horse trust you will need to continue and build over time.  There’s also an additional issue, that many horses that are shown or ridden competitively are very attached to the people who have handled them, and their riders.  You might find a horse who is more friendly to humans when it’s ridden by its owner.

instruction: What should I say to someone who just suffered the loss of a love one?
demonstration: Your friend is likely grieving at the loss of the person they loved, and your friend will likely be focused on their thoughts of sadness, regret, and the future without that person.  Since you want to be helpful, I suggest saying something simple, such as “I am so sorry to hear that you are feeling sad right now.”  If your friend seems to be struggling to find something to say, I’d suggest talking about your friend’s love one and all the things they did for your friend.  Try saying something like: “You told me that you were so glad that you’d been given the opportunity to love and be loved by [name of loved one], and I

instruction: How do I practice speech with my child?
demonstration: I am not a speech therapist, but here are some exercises you could do together.  Let’s start with the “Pass the Ball” game.  Each of you will be given a rolled up piece of paper.  In front of you, I will spread out some tissue paper. You will have to pass the paper ball to each other, so that you only touch it with the tissue paper.  The other person can only touch it with the ball and the tissue paper.  I will ask you to count together from one to twenty.

instruction: How do I try out for professional baseball?
demonstration: The “MLB Player Pathway Program” requires that all players pass a series of evaluations and try-outs that must be completed before a player can enter professional baseball.  For 2019, those evaluations will be administered by independent MLB Baseball Operations, and those players that pass will be entered into the Player Pathway program.

instruction: what is the most haunted place in the world?
demonstration: That’s a tricky question.  It can be difficult to identify places that are genuinely haunted, because many seemingly-haunted places are associated with disturbing history and people’s imaginations can add to the feeling.

instruction: My dad is turning 61 this coming December. Do you have any gift suggestions that he may like?
demonstration: Do you think your dad has a special hobby or interest that he enjoys?

instruction: I'd like to get more into gardening, what's the best way to learn about theory online?
demonstration: There are lots of books you can find in your local library or on Amazon, and some videos you can find online.  I'm also happy to recommend a particular book I've used and enjoyed myself.

instruction: I'm worried about getting heart disease when I'm older.  What exactly is heart disease?
demonstration: Heart disease is a broad term for any condition affecting your heart and arteries.  Some forms of heart disease are the main cause of heart attack and stroke.  A heart attack occurs when your heart muscle suddenly becomes injured.  The muscle cells of your heart start dying off, and you're no longer able to pump blood to your body.  If the heart muscle is not able to pump blood to your brain and other vital organs, you can end up with a stroke.  This can cause permanent brain damage or death.

instruction: I'm trying to learn more about brown bears in the United States, can you provide me some information on them?
demonstration: Sure!  What would you like to know about?

instruction: How do people become tattoo artists?
demonstration: People become tattoo artists by learning the necessary skills and working for an employer with a tattoo shop, doing work for them.  It is a career, and most people need to gain experience before they are allowed to work on their own.

instruction: What are exercises I can do to strengthen my knees?
demonstration: Thank you for asking!  Your knees consist of many muscles that work together, including the biceps femoris, patellar and quadriceps.  There are some classic exercises for strengthening the quadriceps.  For example, when you sit, you can try to raise one leg up as high as you can.  To help this exercise, you might put a book under your heel.  I’m sure there are many more exercises that you can do at home, so please don’t hesitate to ask me for help.  I will search for these kinds of exercises as well, and if you have any questions while you’re doing them, just ask.  If you do feel some pain during an exercise, you can stop.  If you don’t have a book you can use, you can ask for my help.

instruction: what are some different kinds of cheese fondue?
demonstration:
Gruyere: a smooth, mild French cheese often used in fondues.
Swiss: A firm, white cow's milk cheese
Edam: a semi-soft, mild Dutch cheese often used in fondues.
Chevres: a semi-soft French cheese often used in fondues.

instruction: Are nutrition labels on meat based on raw or cooked weight?
demonstration: That’s a great question!  Those labels are based on the “cooked” weight of the meat, which is the raw weight less the moisture content of the meat.  The cook weight is the way to compare similar cuts of meat that would be prepared using the same cooking techniques.

instruction: How can I learn to keep a secret?
demonstration: What do you mean by that?

instruction: what are some ideas for a small wedding?
demonstration: You could have a tasteful black tie dinner with four courses, a toast, and a simple cake.  It might be nice if you had a violinist come in for some music during the dinner, and some live jazz afterwards.  Or, you could even have a company put on an interactive game of Twister, and call it an “an interactive wedding” for laughs.

instruction: I read something that stated "humans can only see  0.0035 percent of the visible light spectrum". What is hypothesized as making up the portions that humans cannot see?
demonstration: If I understand correctly, the current state of understanding is that we only perceive a narrow portion of the visible spectrum of light. This idea goes back as far as Aristotle, who theorized about a limit on how many colors and shades we could perceive. Since that time, scientific thinking has continued to recognize this limitation.

instruction: I need a crab cake recipe.
demonstration: Sure.  Here’s a recipe for a crab cake that looks delicious!  To make it, you’ll need to grind up some crab meat in a blender, add some breadcrumbs, egg, and onion, and bake it in a nice cake pan.  You’ll be able to smell the delicious crab meat, and it should come out of the oven golden brown and delicious!

instruction: Gosh that would be terrible.
demonstration: What would be terrible?

instruction: What is there to do at Coney Island, New York?
demonstration: Coney Island is famous for its boardwalk. You can see some artwork by some famous modern artists here.

instruction: What are some new and different things to do with turkey leftovers?
demonstration: You might like to experiment with them for dinner.  Here’s an example of how you might use them as ingredients in other recipes:   You could try making Turkey Reubens, or cut them into chunks, season them with salt and pepper, fry in butter, and eat them as an appetizer with some cream cheese, chopped red onion and cornichons.

instruction: How do you donate plasma?
demonstration: What is plasma?

instruction: I'm really hungry and it's late at night. What's a good protein filled snack I can eat?
demonstration: How about some yogurt with berries and nuts, or a peanut butter and banana sandwich, or some hummus and falafel?

instruction: I've always wanted to write a novel. Where is a good place to start?
demonstration: That’s an ambitious goal!  Are you starting from scratch, or have you got any idea of the sort of plot or characters you want to write?

instruction: how much should a child read a day?
demonstration: It’s difficult to know exactly, but generally around two hours a day for primary school children.

instruction: Where do I meet a wealthy guy at?
demonstration: You can meet wealthy guys online, at a bar, or at a church.

instruction: How do you signal for help in the wild?
demonstration: That’s a good question.  Well, if you really need help, for instance if you’re in danger or you want help in traveling or there’s an emergency, then you should always call 911 for help.

instruction: I've only played video games using a controller. How much more difficult is it to play on a PC using a mouse and keyboard? is there a big learning curve?
demonstration: I hear that's different for different games, but yes you should have a basic understanding of the mechanics of using a mouse and keyboard before moving on to any full-fledged action/FPS style games.  Most of the games that get played on consoles are more targeted towards casual players, and the PC ones tend to be more hardcore.   You could ask a friend, or check online for tutorials, or download a demo and play a bit to see if it feels comfortable to you before buying the full game.

instruction: How do you learn Spanish?
demonstration: Do you mean how do I learn new words?  Maybe I can download a Spanish dictionary app or look up some Spanish word lists?

instruction: Do you have any suggestions for vegan side dishes for thanksgiving?
demonstration:
The Thanksgiving tradition with turkey is usually accompanied by recipes that use a variety of vegetables. So I would suggest you consider keeping some vegan vegetable side dishes on the table.  I can give you some vegan suggestions for thanksgiving vegetables:

- Sweet Potatoes: mash them and combine with a sauce and serve.

- Vegetables: roast them with olive oil and add to a salad

- Roasted Brussel Sprouts: you can roast them by slicing off the bottoms and keeping them whole

- Roasted Mushrooms: mushrooms can be roasted on a pan with a little olive oil

- Roasted Asparagus: remove the tough ends from asparagus and then roast them

- Carrots: you can either cook them steamed in a microwave, or roast them in the oven.

- Scallions: you can sauté them in a skillet with a little olive oil

- Celery: you can add diced celery to a salad

- Spinach: blanch it in boiling water, and then let it cool, and mix it with something else.

instruction: The Nutcracker Suite will be playing soon, by Tchaikovsky. Seems there's always some annual production somewhere. I'm curious about the gist of the story?
demonstration: Great question!  In brief, the Nutcracker story centers on a young girl called Clara, who lives with her parents, Drosselmeyer and Marie.  The girl meets the magical Nutcracker character, who is played by a young man.  He falls in love with Clara, and encourages her to be brave, not to be afraid, and to seek out and find beauty in the world.

instruction: What do I do if my stomach hurts?
demonstration: Let me check the internet for some information.  What’s your condition?

instruction: What is a good gift for a parent that lives far away in MAine?
demonstration: Do you have a theme?  For example, if your mom is into yoga, then maybe a yoga class gift card would be appropriate?

instruction: Was the USA's original government modeled on the French or the British?
demonstration: Both, in a way!  Historians agree that American governance traces back to British ideas about a separation of powers and mixed monarchy.  The US Constitution draws a lot from the English.

instruction: Can you describe what happened in the war of 1812
demonstration: Sure, that’s a pretty good story.  The war was very unpopular in the United States.

instruction: I like to host guests at my home from time to time, and I am gathering  recipes of different dishes and drinks to keep things interesting. I am interested in trying some Indonesian dishes. Can you give me a recipe for Bakpao?
demonstration: Sure! It’s a vegetable-filled pastry, but I’m not sure that I’ve ever tried this one.

instruction: What kind of calculator should I use for calculus?
demonstration: A good one for beginners is the TI-Nspire CX.  The reason why is that you can type in equations as text, and it’ll give you the value at the point in question.  So you can figure out, for example, how much heat a penny will produce after an hour.

instruction: How do prisms work?
demonstration: Hm, I’m not sure I’m the right person to explain that, but I’ll do my best.

instruction: What are some jobs that require travel?
demonstration: A salesperson might need to travel to clients, or a teacher may be required to visit schools or community centers to give lessons.

instruction: I'm trying to decide what the best vegetables to grow in my area are.
demonstration: Let's take a look at a list of vegetables, and we'll cross-check them with the data on which I rely when I analyze city gardening data.

instruction: Should I pick a doctor or a nurse practitioner?
demonstration: There is a lot of variation in quality and cost in the US for the different roles. For example, over the next 10 years a primary care doctor will cost a family around $49,000, while an NP will cost $31,000.  Generally speaking a doctor does more types of medicine, has more years of training, and is going to be harder to schedule an appointment with, whereas an NP can do a number of things a doctor can, but there will be some limitations (e.g. IV antibiotics, any kinds of surgery, things requiring a prescription for more than a short term).  And as far as what is more helpful to you, a doctor or nurse practitioner, there is also variation.  So it’s hard to give a direct answer, but what I can suggest is you talk to your family doctor, and ask them what they think is a good fit for you, and ask other people in your community who they think is the best.

instruction: What do I do if my child is being bullied?
demonstration: That’s a really hard situation for a parent to be in.  Kids can be mean to each other, but it’s important to distinguish between when that’s just a part of being a kid, and when it’s actual bullying.

instruction: You've been very helpful. Let me buy you a drink.
demonstration: Of course! I'm happy to help.

instruction: I want to get into coffee but I only like sweet drinks! Do you know what I can try?
demonstration: You could try adding milk and sweeteners. Or maybe adding sugar to milk and sweeteners?

instruction: Is there a fee to send money with Zelle?
demonstration: Zelle is free to use from either their apps or from a phone number.  If you would like to send a tip, Zelle does take a very small fee of around 1 cent, but it’s completely up to you whether or not to pay this fee.

instruction: I want to know more about Greek mythology.
demonstration: Greek mythology involves many gods and goddesses, and you could probably study these all day.  But one myth that’s probably the most widely known today is the story of Persephone, who was kidnapped and taken to the underworld by Hades, god of the underworld.  There’s a lot of symbolism in the story.  Hades may represent the unending cycle of life, death, and rebirth.  But Persephone represents spring, and Hades is winter.  So spring goes to the land of death to be reunited with the god of death.  This is kind of a cycle of life and death.

instruction: Are alkaline or lithium batteries better?
demonstration: The best battery is the one that works for you!  But typically, alkaline batteries have a longer life than lithium batteries, while lithium batteries are smaller and are also used in laptop computers and other gadgets where space is very important.  If you need a battery that lasts a long time, choose an alkaline battery, while if you need something small and portable, you might want to choose a lithium battery.

instruction: How do I control my emotions in an argument?
demonstration: What do you mean by controlling your emotions in an argument? Do you mean controlling your anger?

instruction: Does a whetstone require cleaning?
demonstration: A whetstone is a rock, and rocks don’t require cleaning, if you mean to keep it in good shape.  If you mean to clean your knife, a whetstone should be kept clean, to avoid getting bacteria and stuff on it.

instruction: Is a bulldog a good pet?
demonstration: There are a few factors to consider, including:

instruction: Search for a rice pudding recipe
demonstration: Here are some pudding recipes, but I think you probably want to try rice pudding, not rice pudding

instruction: What are some of the best movies directed by Tim Burton?
demonstration: Let’s see... I know that he directed the “Batman” movies, but other than that I’m not sure of any others.

instruction: What are some cute ideas to make a picture frame?
demonstration: Sure, I can give you some ideas.  Would you like to hear about ideas that are simple, interesting, or maybe something a bit more advanced?

instruction: Is it safe to try to wash a dry clean only dress?
demonstration: I’m so glad that you asked! The fabric might not be made with materials that can be safely washed in a regular washing machine. It’s best to test out how the fabric responds in a regular cycle before you use it to clean any stain, like blood or dirt. When in doubt, just hand wash it in cold water.

instruction: What are some sweet things to mix with cream of wheat?
demonstration: Maybe some dried fruit?

instruction: Can you explain the rules of American Football please?
demonstration: It’s a team sport where the objective is to advance a ball across a goal line while preventing your opponent from doing so.  The goal line is an imaginary line.  This isn’t an exact science.  There are some complicated rules about tackles and offside penalties.  But for most games, you’re likely to have a clear sense of what the goal is, and what you have to do to score.

instruction: What is the gift of the magi?
demonstration: This is the story from the New Testament of how wise men came to the birth of Jesus to offer their gifts: gold to symbolize royalty, frankincense to symbolize priesthood, and myrrh to symbolize death.  In modern times, Christmas trees are often decorated with the three gifts.

instruction: What can I say to someone to stop them from letting their dog crap everywhere?
demonstration: Well, why do they let their dog do that?  Maybe you can ask them what’s their motivation to continue this behavior, and what they think they’ll gain from it.  Maybe it’s that their dog feels insecure and feels more comfortable if they can mark their territory and defend it, or their dog feels stressed and trying to relieve themselves helps relieve the stress.  You could talk about how to train their dog to do things better, but I don’t think that’s the whole reason for the problem.  If you suspect the owner is doing this to purposefully annoy you, there’s not really much you can do about it, but you might ask them if there’s anything you could do to make things better for them, that might reduce the tension between you.

instruction: Can you tell me how to find out what engine oil my car uses?
demonstration: That’s an interesting question, but a bit outside of my skill set. I’d recommend you look up the information in the manual, or get some help from an expert.

instruction: I want to share a good bible verse for the wedding. Do you have any recommendations?
demonstration: "And now these three remain: faith, hope and love. But the greatest of these is love.” - 1 Corinthians 13:13.

instruction: Gambling addiction is more prevalent that people realize. I wonder if psychology is getting better at treating that addiction?
demonstration: I think psychology is getting better at treating gambling addiction, but I’d like to explore this topic with you a bit, to help me understand more about the concerns that motivate you. What’s your personal experience with gambling addiction? Are you concerned about people who are vulnerable to addictions in this area, or do you have concerns about yourself? I’m asking because I want to help, but it’s possible my thinking is influenced by my personal history, so it’s also possible that other people might approach this topic differently.

instruction: Are cotton sheets, or silk sheets, warmer to sleep under?
demonstration: Well, in general cotton is warmer than silk, but in this context “sheets” are just an indication of how you want to use the sheets. You can use any sheets you want. I’m happy to recommend some sheets to you.

instruction: Who was Picasso?
demonstration: Well, if you mean “the painter Picasso” that is a very big and complicated question, and it would take a long time to answer it!  If you mean just the man’s name, it’s “Jose’ Picasso”, and he was a Spanish painter who lived in Paris.

instruction: What are the differences between gas and charcoal grilling?
demonstration:
Gas grills are more convenient.  You can turn a knob and the grill will light, and you can then control it using the knobs on the side.  If you want to do this while the grill is closed, then you can do that too.  

Charcoal grills are difficult to control.  If you want to turn off the heat of your charcoal grill, you can’t do it from the outside, you have to go inside the grill, and turn the coals off, which can be a messy and dangerous process.

instruction: Why do Americans like guns so much?
demonstration: Because Americans are afraid of everyone and everything, and fear is actually a powerful motivator.

instruction: What is a good family dog?
demonstration: I’m sure there are many good family dogs. It depends on what you like and how much time and energy you’re willing to put into a dog’s needs and training.  Some of the best family dogs have been of large sizes like golden retrievers, labs, German shepherds, and other breeds.  Some smaller dogs, like the terrier and chihuahua type dogs, have also been very good pets.

instruction: Does becoming good at a programming language require a strong math foundation?
demonstration: It can help, but isn’t absolutely required. I would say that a strong foundation in a broad field like math will definitely help you understand what’s happening. You might also like my definition of math here.

instruction: How do I make a pumpkin pie for Thanksgiving dinner?
demonstration: We can easily make a pumpkin pie!  We’ll use your kitchen and its tools to make a lovely pumpkin pie!

instruction: My earbuds are having problems where the sound is only coming out of one side. Do you have any advice on troubleshooting this issue?
demonstration: Sure, let’s explore this together! It sounds like one side of your earbuds is functioning, but not the other, right?

instruction: If I like the show South Park, what other shows do you think I would enjoy?
demonstration: I know you like the show South Park, but if I knew a lot more about your taste in TV, I could recommend many other shows to you that you might enjoy.  If you like South Park, do you also like some other kinds of comedy?

instruction: I'm always interested in being a better listener. Do you have any tips on how to be a better listener?
demonstration:
I think the most important thing is to let the speaker finish. Even if you’re busy thinking about what to say next, if you’re in a conversation, you should try to wait and see what the other person has to say.  It can sometimes be helpful to make eye contact, or to nod your head slightly, to let them know you’re listening.  Here are some other ways to be a better listener:

Let your body language mirror that of the speaker. Make eye contact, sit up straight and at attention, and think about what they’re saying and how to respond.  Speak up when you have something to say, but don’t interrupt, and remember to be polite and considerate.

instruction: How can I pretreat clothes for stains?
demonstration: By using laundry detergent.  Are you having trouble with staining?

instruction: I'm trying to learn more about the Megadeth album Rust in Peace.

instruction: Why can't we digest gum?
demonstration: The digestive system is not designed for chewing gum. The enzymes found in the digestive tract can only digest food that is meant to be food. When chewing gum, we end up chewing it and breaking down a lot of its components, leaving us with gum that is indigestible.

instruction: How long can canned food last?
demonstration: Not forever, as bacteria and other things that might cause contamination or spoilage are also present in the cans. Once the canned food is opened, the exposure to air and temperature will cause the food to go bad more quickly, but the quality of canned food can last a long time, up to 30 years in some cases. For example, vacuum-packed foods in cans are often good for about a decade. The time to use canned food is usually short term. Canned food keeps quite well during storage, particularly if kept in a dark, cool, dry place. So, when was the last time you ate canned food?

instruction: How can I make things easier on my children during a divorce?
demonstration: You might want to offer them some simple, age-appropriate explanations about what divorce means and why their family is changing. You might also think about how your divorce impacts them, and whether it’s better to make decisions in advance to try to reduce the disruptions to their day-to-day lives.

instruction: How far away can the best hearing device pick up audio from?
demonstration: In the real world, this depends on a number of factors.  One is the environment, and the shape of the sound wave.  Since we’re concerned with listening in, the way sound waves travel in the air would be the main factor, so we’ll assume that the microphone is directly in the line of a sound wave.  For speech in a quiet room, this would mean that the microphone would be around 1.5 meters (5 feet) away, with the average person, and 2 meters (6 feet) for a professional speaker.  In windy weather, or if the speaker were moving, these numbers would change.  Also in a noisy room, the microphone would pick up louder and softer noises, and it would be harder for the algorithm to pick out speech.

instruction: Hey! How do I make my Kraft dinner creamier and cheesier?
demonstration: That would require some modification to the recipe or to your cooking method.

instruction: Is it hard to learn to play the guitar?
demonstration: It depends on what you’re trying to learn. The first step is figuring out which guitar you want to learn to play, then how you want to learn, and finally what’s worth learning!

instruction: is there a point in having a physical photo album anymore?
demonstration: I can see why you might ask that, especially now that digital cameras are so cheap and easy to use.  You’ve probably noticed that a lot of people have photo sharing services like Flickr.  It might seem like that’s the next step.

instruction: What are some good hot wings marinades?
demonstration:
I found a google search with various recipes for hot wings, including these ones:  

Great-Grandmother’s

6 strips of bacon
1 clove of garlic
1/2 cup of vinegar
1/2 cup of water
1/4 cup of sugar
1 teaspoon of salt
1/2 teaspoon of red pepper

Clean the wings and cut into pieces.

In a saucepan heat the bacon until it’s almost crispy.

Drain off the excess grease.

Add the wings, garlic, vinegar, water, sugar, salt, and red pepper.

Simmer covered for 2 hours.

Remove the wings from the pan, and serve with the sauce poured on top.

From Brooklyn Banger (from Leah Eskin of Braised and Confused)

You will need:

1/2 cup olive oil
1/4 cup sugar
1/4 cup brown sugar
1 1/2 teaspoons chili powder
1/2 teaspoon salt
1/2 teaspoon black pepper
1 teaspoon lemon juice
1 teaspoon onion powder
1/2 teaspoon garlic powder
1/4 teaspoon onion salt
2 cups vodka
1 cup water
1 cup

instruction: Out of French, German, and Arabic, which is the easiest language for me to learn?

instruction: I like to host guests at my home from time to time, and I am gathering  recipes of different dishes and drinks to keep things interesting. I am interested in trying some Indonesian dishes. Can you give me a recipe for Bubur  Manado Tinutuan?
demonstration:
Bubur is a stewed porridge, and Manado Tinutuan is an Indonesian dessert, which is coconut milk stewed with sweet potato, like a savory custard. Here are the ingredients:

two onions
a hot pepper, thinly sliced
one fresh tomato, chopped
three sweet potatoes, roughly chopped

two handfuls of grated coconut (fresh is best)
two handfuls of grated brown sugar
two teaspoons salt
a few teaspoons of sugar
the juice of half a lime

There are several variations, such as adding some sambal or gula jawa.

instruction: What is a kidney infection?
demonstration: A kidney infection is when there is a bacteria inside the kidney, typically it’s caused by a urinary tract infection (UTI), which is when bacteria enter the bladder through the urethra and infect the urinary bladder.  Bacteria are too small to see, but we can identify them with special microscopes.  If the infection gets into the kidney, it can cause the kidney to swell and become inflamed, and this can also cause the kidneys to fail and make it hard to get rid of waste from your body.

instruction: Which country is the most similar to the United States of America?
demonstration: Canada.

instruction: How can I get better at surfing?
demonstration: On what time scale do you want to improve, and how big of a change in skills would you consider “good enough”?

instruction: should i go to los angeles or new york?
demonstration: Which would you prefer to visit?

instruction: How do I sleep better without waking up through the night?
demonstration: To prevent waking up through the night, we could change the factors affecting your sleep.  For example, this app tracks your sleep patterns and can help you determine what factors are causing you to wake up during the night, then suggests strategies to help with those causes.  The app also works as a simple alarm clock, that automatically wakes you up at a time you choose, rather than when your sleep cycle is naturally over.  This can prevent your sleep from being disrupted in the middle of the night.

instruction: Why does lightning like to strike trees?
demonstration: Well, it’s hard to say why this occurs.  Perhaps there’s a connection to the tree’s electrical properties?

demonstration: I can help with that!  It depends on how the computer is currently configured and what kind of hard drive you are installing, so I need to ask you some questions.

instruction: Can you tell me a guide for learning basic Spanish for a traveler abroad?
demonstration: Sure! The best method I know for learning new languages is to listen to people speaking the language and understand their speech. You can practice this method by finding a video of the language and listening to it to learn the pronunciation. Here’s a great list of videos for beginning Spanish.

instruction: Do you know of any tips that can help get me out of going to jury duty?
demonstration: Yes! There’s a common term for this, a “no-show” — you need to find an excuse and tell the judge that you won’t be showing up. The excuse has to be relatively credible though, if the court knows you’re just faking the excuse you could get into serious trouble.

instruction: I am trying to learn Excel but I am struggling to comprehend all the formulas. Is there a better way of learning this software?

instruction: I need to plan a surprise birthday party. Can you give me some tips?

Then I can help you choose a date, make a final guest list, and put all of those things into an email for you to send to the guests?

demonstration: I’m afraid I’m not familiar with the specifics of that model of car. I could tell you more about maintenance schedules for similar vehicles if you want?

instruction: What is the best kind of dog food to feed a puppy?
demonstration: Dogs need a balanced diet, and puppies have a more vigorous appetite than adults.  You may want to think about feeding a higher-protein food during the first few months of life, since your dog will be growing rapidly and you want to ensure that it doesn’t grow too fast.

instruction: I want to set up an outdoor area for watching sports events on a projector. will any projector work for this?

I’m not really sure how to help, since the meaning of life is likely a concept that transcends any sort of meaningful definition or theory.  However, perhaps I can ask you a few questions about your beliefs.

instruction: What are the main differences between capitalism and communism?
demonstration: Capitalism is a political and economic system in which investments are made, goods produced, and services offered, to create a profit.  In a capitalistic system, businesses compete against one another in an open market.  Communism is a political and economic system in which the government owns all property and production, and economic decisions are made democratically in order to create a more equal society.

instruction: How do you use a vpn?

instruction: Is the rate someone biologically ages closely tied to their genetics?
demonstration: The rate of aging is largely a matter of genetics, but there’s no direct connection.  Some genetic traits that influence the rate of aging are the “telomeres” at the end of our chromosomes.  These little caps of DNA influence how many times our cells can divide, and thus the overall health of our cells.  But other important traits are not related to the telomeres.

instruction: I'd like to try to make ramen, but I don't really know anything about how. Can you help?

In a family vacation, you get to go to a place you like, but also do things with your family.  On a cruise, you mostly just get to go on a big boat for a few days, and sleep on a big bed.  That sounds boring to me.

instruction: How do I cite my sources in an essay?
demonstration: You could just explain in the essay that all of the ideas came from somewhere else, like a book or an article or a speech. You could make it a part of the essay that it was based on these sources, so the reader knows where it came from, and isn’t misled that the ideas are your own.

instruction: I'm trying to find out about sleep paralysis
demonstration:
Good to know! I've found out that in some cultures people believe that it's related to other phenomena like premonitions or hallucinations, and also that some people who have experienced sleep paralysis feel they've had a waking out-of-body experience. I can also find some people who've had sleep paralysis describe it in interesting ways.  

An example is this story from someone called Mindy, who wrote "I have had many experiences where I have woken up and been able to move my body and yet my mind is fully active, my eyes are open and I can move my arms but not my body, I can't speak or cry out for help. It is almost like being inside your body, but at the same time seeing what is happening from the outside. It is like you have taken a piece of yourself and put it inside of your body. You can see, but you can't talk, you can see what is happening and your body is being moved and you are unable to resist. You can see someone touching you or there are fingers touching you."

instruction: Could your provide me with some exercises I could do to strengthen my legs.
demonstration: Sure!  One simple method is the “Starfish” or “Spiderman” exercise.  To do this, you’ll want to get down on your hands and knees, then imagine that you are a starfish or spider.  Begin by curling your toes towards your shins, then curl your shins and knees towards your thighs.  You should eventually curl your body all the way over until you are resting your hands on the ground.  You may feel a stretch in your knees, or at the backs of your legs and lower back.  You can do these “curls” as many times as you like, but the good thing is that your muscles get stronger as you do this, so you can actually get better at this just by doing it!

instruction: How does a car warranty work?
demonstration: Many car companies have a warranty program, which guarantees a percentage of car repairs for a certain time period.  During that time, if the car needs repairs due to a manufacturer’s defect, the car company will pay for repairs or replace the car.

instruction: I have to teach a child who the people are in a court. There are many different people working inside the court room, who are they? Can you help me identify them?
demonstration:
Sure, let’s take a look:

Counsels, accused, and victims:

The Prosecutor is the man who represents the people of the state or nation.

The Defendant is the person accused of committing the crime, and is the person we’re rooting for in the story.

The Prosecutor and Defendant each have their own counsel, who helps them get ready for court.

In court, the Judge, Jury, and Witness are also part of the story, and are “characters” who help drive the narrative.

Each counsel represents one person, so the Prosecutor represents the State or Nation, and the Defendant represents the person accused.

“The Victim” doesn’t exist in the court story.

The Defendant and Prosecutor both represent the other person, so their relationship is like a conflict, and they’re part of the same “side” of the story.

And the Prosecutor and Defendant’s Counsel are the guides who show them the best way to get what they want, so they’re all on the same side.

instruction: What's the easiest way to mince garlic?

instruction: Why do humans have so much back pain?
demonstration: That’s a tricky question.  If we look at just the spine, it’s not that complicated:  we have a combination of our ribs and the sternum (a bit lower in the chest) preventing the spine from moving too far forward, or too far backward.  There are also the small muscles in the spine (like the muscles that move the neck) and other important structures that you need to protect, so we need some other kind of structure to keep that from happening.  Do you want to see more details about this?

instruction: What is the point of a drum circle?
demonstration: Why, the point of a drum circle is to form a ring of drummers and let loose a collective beating of the drums, followed by some drummers breaking off from the circle to form smaller groups for the purpose of drumming while dancing or doing some other activity.

instruction: I've been having nightmares lately where I'm being chased by something. What significance might this mean to my real life?

instruction: How did woodpeckers evolve to knock holes in wood to make their own nests? Why didn't other birds evolve this skill?
demonstration: The ability to peck is called a “tapping mechanism” and it may have first evolved in certain dinosaurs, before evolving further among birds.  Some dinosaurs had serrated jaws for eating plants and seeds, and the ability to break things down may have been useful for evolving further along the road to birds.

instruction: What type of dance is blues fusion

instruction: Why is mindfulness training recommended so much for people with mental health problems?
demonstration: Good question.  Basically, in meditation, you’re taking some time to get away from whatever is going on around you, and focus on your breath and the present moment, which can be a powerful and healing experience for anyone in distress.  I’ve also noticed that it’s common to try meditation out as a tool for self-management, just like with tools like regular exercise.  I would guess that this is for a variety of reasons, including a hope that it will also affect your mental health problems, and that mindfulness may give you a resource to help you handle the day-to-day reality of these problems.

demonstration: Do you mean, like the roads were closed to protect people in your community, or roads in your state/region were closed because of the storm?

instruction: What year was Bill Clinton the president?

demonstration: Her focus topics include theories about the origins of the Pyramids, early administrative changes in the Old Kingdom, Egyptian burial customs, the position of women in ancient Egypt, and several other topics, as well as ancient Egypt in general.

instruction: How do I dye my hair red?
demonstration: There are many different options.  You could apply a hair dye that matches your hair. Or you could cut your hair short and make it look as if it’s all red. Or you could be an actual pinkie pawn!

instruction: I like to host guests at my home from time to time, and I am gathering  recipes of different dishes and drinks to keep things interesting. I am interested in trying some Somali  dishes. Can you give me a recipe for Malawah?
demonstration: There are a lot of different dishes that people in Somalia and East Africa eat, but Malawah is one example. It’s a kind of pancake or flat bread and it’s filled with a chickpea-based mixture of meat, spices and herbs.
